I could leave my car for 30 minutes and visit a client and this thing thinks you're driving around still.

Easy to set up and use. I have auto tracking turned off and just start a trip when it's business related. It's working great and I love the prompts to run a report each month, it reminds me to do my claim. The reports are easy to run and understand, I save the files as my record for tax. Highly recommend 👌

I've always recorded my milage in a little book. Giving this a go at the moment. So far it hasn't let me down. update. I've just subscribed. I didn't get the beacon as was thinking maybe it's free.its a bit pricey so maybe in the future. Will keep just the subscription for now.
I love this app and would absolutely rate 5 stars but the most recent update keeps crashing on my Android phone 😅 I can't access my logs for the year for taxes... help!

started using it, and then I get a ransome warning. no more than 15 car movements and you need to pay 11 euros per month. it is not mentioned anywhere in the description. ended up paying it. the app is actually easier to use than the other ones. upate: this app is very good. 1 downside is battery drain.

so far so good, separation between bussiness an personal able to have multiple people on the app at once as they drive different vehicles within the business we can track each of their kms. highly recommend if your needing to track vehicle kms for bussiness purposes.
Been using it for years, but also my beacon finally expired. Probably dead battery. I talked to customer service and they said they would send me a replacement beacon. Great service! Thanks again.
I definitely would recommend this app attracts your mileage it constantly is tracking your mileages when your emotion it's free you can save certain trips if you need to I mean the app is awesome
The app and tracker beacon works really well and is ideal for my millage for tax. customer service were great and had my problem sorted in short order 👍👍
Completely crashed at the end of a long drive and won't load up at all now. Pretty useless if I have to reinstall it and lose everything
Support is worse than AI. They straight up don't listen and give non-related answers. Expensive for paid version as well.
I'm enjoying the ease of use , this is very practical and great for my reporting , I definitely will be looking at the premium options in the near future 😉
This is by far the worst place that I've ever have to deal with. They're not reliable and very inconsistent. I would give them a 0 if that was available.
I've been using this a few days now. Simple to use and exceptionally accurate. Will be getting other members of staff to download to make it easier submitting monthly mileage ..
this seems a great app but it runs continually. As such it is an enormous drain on my battery, accounting for nearly 20% of battery use. Hence the low rating
I like it but it doesn't always connect automatically even withe beacon and I have to manually enter the trip
After a trip it stays blank.White only screen.Does not work.I have a Samsung A54.The app freeze.Even if I turn off my phone and on and open the app it stay in a white freeze screen.
I'm about to purchase the subscription for work related travels, installed lite version for trial and noted extreme battery drain while idle on S24 Ultra, what could be a problem?
Easy to use and accurate. So accurate that it helps me track my hours. No regrets in downloading this app.

When I tried this out initially (free version) it seemed to work well, and I had high hopes. Unfortunately it also tracks you on a train (there must surely be a way to detect train movement using GPS, unless it thinks I'm driving my car on the tracks!). And after I deleted several train journeys, it stopped detecting my car journeys. And when I manually entered details, it showed a different route that didn't start where I told it to start. I may as well estimate journeys using Google maps!
Outstanding app. Never had any issues and it's convenience is unparalleled. Keep it up!

App was working fine until about 4 days ago. I've tried uninstalling and reinstalling, it still won't load the map, to start tracking miles. (Update): App is working right, again! Download the update! (Update 2/21/26) This happens about once a year where it stops logging and uploading to the app. I've recommended this app so many times, but I'm done with going a week or two without the app working right. My drives aren't failing, but aren't uploading either. It's been almost a week of failure.

I have used this app for years to track my mileage. Up until not ive had little to no issues. recently, everytime i go to manually add my miles, it pops a login error:no internet connection. I have tried reinstalling the app, logging out and back in, clearing cache, restarting phone, on and off wifi, everything. nothing has fixed it and its extremely frustrating. might have to find a new app.

EDIT: It's been several days now and still getting errors when trying to manually input miles, while giving me 0 synced drives (0 failed) when using the auto track feature. I would like to change my rating, but until these bugs are fixed this app is nearly useless currently. I've been using this app for work for the last 8 months and haven't had sync issues with auto tracking miles, or login error when manually inputting them, but I've now not been able to upload my data for the past 3 days now.

this app is absolute garbage. drive all day expecting it to log your miles only to find out at the end of the day it logs nothing. failed upload. no internet connection. oooookay. it worked for exactly 1 day. I can't even manually add my drives. I get the same error of having no internet connection. doesn't seem to matter if im on WI-FI or mobile data. Just garbage.

several times I've started my 'track drive', to start now and when I clicked on 'i'm done driving' the app says I accumulated $0 dollars and zero miles for those trips. I'm a doordash driver, and their app has failed me many times where it did not log my miles. I'm searching for another app that doesn't have this issue.

so sick of the app randomly not working. I drove 200 miles today. it missed all the miles between stores and tracked it as a single round trip. now it just stopped working completely. ALL of my trips actually like they are recording then don't. Can't even add miles as it keeps saying no internet. EVERY other app that requires internet is fine

Just now noticed the app isn't uploading/saving my miles 🤦🏽‍♀️ since MARCH 3RD!!! Almost a whole month later. When I complete the drive it shows the usual screen stating its been saved but the pop-up notification bubble says "0 uploaded (0 failed)" && when I try to add manually it says there is a network error. I've restarted && Uninstalled the app but nothing....sucks bc I really liked using Stride.....I just sent a report to customer service too.

been using this app for years. and up and till March 30 was working fine. its has not recorded. So after multiple failed support attempts. I can say tech support for the mileage portion of the app is no good. I figured out on my on that if I track my drives I then wait until I am in and on wifi. the mileage portion of the app is not hooking to the internet the rest of the app works fine on mobile or wifi. it will then up load the current days trips. Hope this helps someone else.

Can't add mileage for any date in 2025. There are a few dates last year that I forgot to track, I try to add them manually but it never works. Tap the add button and nothing happens. Filed IT ticket and chatted via email. They had me screen record and send them a video. They said it was an issue with their software and they are "working" on it. This was well over a week ago. Still not working. Yes I've tried uninstalling the app, force stopping it and clearing the cache. App is great if it works

I've recently updated my app and really wish I hadn't. It's been working great with no issues for years until this recent update. It doesn't track my drive. Just shows my starting point and straight line to my destination which cuts corners/ not accurate whatsoever. Now i have to manually add my miles. There is no longer a icon on my notification bar allowing to quickly turn it on. The auto enable while driving is no where to be found. Just horrible. Please go back to the old version.

Overall it's a good product! Since they changed to the new yellow icon, their service has gone downhill. I lost 179 miles today and a couple hundred more over the past week. Now, it seems that if you're not on this app, it no longer keeps track of mileage. The app has full access to locations, free from being optimized, and no limits. Now, it does not work like it used to. I never had problems where I've lost miles like this. I'm having to go back and calculate how many miles I've actually lost.

It's an ok app. Performance struggles as the app is constantly refreshing when moving from screen to screen or when you switch back to the app from something else. The mileage tracker accuracy could definitely use some improvement. All in all I think it's great for manually recording mileage and income but not necessarily as a live mileage tracker.

Worked well for a couple years but has gotten worse and worse. Inaccurate location tracking has gotten really bad. I'll be sitting completely still and my location will keep bouncing around the map. Trips don't sync after clicking "I'm done driving" until I close and open the app again. Trips will disappear like they never happened, but will appear again when starting a new trip. There are serious bugs.

Difficult to manually start mileage tracking when it doesn't automatically start. Also it sometimes auto-starts when I'm walking through the house with my phone. Just updated, and all my 2023 transactions are gone. I'm going back to writing down my mileage in a tiny notebook. It also really, really wants to be a full bookkeeping/tax app. I already have that, I just didn't want to have to remember to log my miles!

Absolutely the worst app to track any mileage on your vehicles. I've used this app for over 3 years and it's done great until they released a update and it went downhill after that lol. I gave them a chance and have been hoping that they would fix this issue but no, it has been over a month. I'm now losing money. When I start/stop my travel It won't stop, it will continue. I have it now at 96hrs of driving. Your button for completing my drive has not been working

Your app just stops tracking miles. This has been happening for over 3 months, I have uninstalled it and then reinstalled it a week or two later over the last 3 months to see if it's fixed and it has not been fixed. For example today I've driven 105.5 mi and your app says I've driven 24.5. it keeps accurate track of the time. Just not the miles. I really hope you fix this problem for those that are having it, I will no longer be trying to use this app.

One bad thing is that if you don't have internet on your phone, it seems not to keep tracking your miles. Sometimes it stops without tracking without you knowing it but in general, it works good. Good thing I like about it is that when you forget to end your trip for the day, it automatically detects that the car is not moving anymore and it ends it for you. I'll recommend it.

3 star is being overly generous. Since the update that also switched from blue to yellow. It's been horrible. I've used it for yrs now it stops recording mileage. Now every time I turn on the app. I also reset my auto-meter because I would lose mileage. I would work for 5 hrs only the first 5 minutes gets recorded. How do I know because my mileage count is low and the arrow is a straight line from one point to another

UPDATE : WAS better now back to bad! Permissions allowed and set not to pause when unused (other than photos and audio) but it turns off tracking on its own and records nothing! Not sure what's going on with the upgrades. I have to constantly check if it's still tracking. I've uninstalled the app hoping it would help but it's not. I allowed it permission to track when I'm using the app. The map logs of my previous trips are there for a few hours and when I look back at them they are gone.

The new version has glitches... When I attempt to click the "I'm done driving" button, it won't work. Update; Glitch still happening. Lost two days of hours of driver time being tracked bc the app stopped working & I didn't know until the end of the day. I'm going to have to switch to a more reliable app. Can't afford to lose days of my drive time. Also changing my star rating bc of this issue. Please don't respond with your typical blanket response. Please spend that time rectifying issues

I have used this app for years to track my mileage. I used to love it. In the past few months, the app no longer does what I need it to do, so I'm looking for a new option. The app doesn't track miles accurately. I will drive hundreds of miles only to check the app after a shift to say I've only driven 15 miles. This will make things very frustrating come tax time. Fix your app, you literally have ONE JOB

I've been using the app for the last few days, and it is very helpful and tracking mileage for both Rideshare and food delivery. It is very intuitive, always promise me with notifications when I am driving, to help me remember to log my miles. Overall, a very useful app. I don't know if money will come into play, I'm assuming that eventually will when tax time comes around and I want to print out a report, but for now, it appears to be a very good app.

I really like the app while I'm using it. I drive Rideshare and I depend on the mileage tracking. BUT, and it's a big BUT, as I'm doing my taxes, it's a very long process to go through each day to write down my mileage so I can tally my miles and use the miles driven for my business for my tax forms. Ugh!! The only total on the app that I can find is the total dollar amount of mileage deductions, not the actual total number of miles driven in that year. If you can do something about that, then this app would be perfect. As it is now, I'm sitting here going through every freaking day that I worked last year writing down the miles driven for each. This blows, lol. Outside of that, great app that I totally rely on.

This was my go-to app for mileage and business expenses. Since the most recent update, its been awful. It no longer calcluates mileage accurately, it crashes constantly and I can't even pull up my expense information. Plus it's constantly asking me about health insurance, which I already have. After more than 2 years, looks like it's time to move on from Stride.

I have been using this on my Galaxy S21 since February mainly for tracking miles. Entries that were logged with added notes for "purpose of trip" (so I had confirmed successful logging at the end of each trip) have been stripped of info. The mileage is there, but the addresses both say "null" and the notes I added are gone. Some will still be there and then another series of days will say "null". Customer service told me to uninstall and reinstall app. I did so to find no change to the problem.

It is often inaccurate. I've been in the habit of noting mileage myself for probably more than a year now, and it can be off by 15 miles or more. I drive for a living. This is consistently failing me. I've contacted them more than once and done what they recommended, but the app just fails me anyway. I have to keep track and add or subtract to fix it. There is no way to subtract. I just have to not turn the app on sometimes while I'm working.

Love the idea of the app. Wish it had self tracking because I always forget to start tracking my mileage. For some reason it does not allow me go enter forgot to track mileage. Would be nice if my home could be saved so I don't have to keep typing in my house address. Again like the idea of the app, just wish it was designed a little better.

It was working fine, but now it constantly logging me out of the app and giving error messages. Its has become a pain to constantly make it do whats it is supposed to do at a touch. I am having to constantly close and reopen the app or restart my phone, and I don't have time for that. I don't care about any technical mumbo-jumbo. When I try to acess my totals to make sure its tracking, I get error messages. Once something thats supposed to be a convenience isn't...well I move on.

I've been using this app for between 3 & 4 years and now all of a sudden, it doesn't track my location consistently... I'll be delivering all day and when I get home I see that it's missing either a huge chunk of time (mileage wise) or sometimes multiple times!? I really hope they update whatever changes they made to fix this problem!

After the second to last update, I have not been able to get mileage tracking to be accurate. That update things were recorded as around 5x more than actually given. This newer update is better, but it's still quoting around double, which makes this app almost completely useless for me. I simply can't use it to audit for my work mileage if I can't get consistent tracking on the app. I will probably have to delete and find something else, which is disappointing having used it for the last 3 years

I like the app pretty much. I do suggest that if you are thinking of adding this that you should still keep track of your mileage with your trip odometer. The app misses a few miles from start to finish. It can vary from anything less than a mile up to five or more miles depending on how many miles you've driven. I like to keep a log of all my trips as proof should I get audited. This app and a log will help in that event.

1 starred for now because what the heck is going on?? Why change a good thing? The app is glitching out like crazy. Tried to use it last night while working and noticed the miles were awfully low. That's because it kept restarting at 0 for whatever reason. So I decided to turn it off and then I went back in the app later and it randomly turned mile tracking back on?? And today I open the app up and it's crashing constantly and saying I somehow drove 45 miles in my sleep? 🤦

Works sometimes. Often just doesn't track and I have to check after every drive and input manually pretty frequently. Updated because it's working even less often. I have to manually check and re-add mileage multiple times a day. I'm too far into it to download a new app right now, but more often than not I have to manually re-add. App shows incorrect mileage often.

I have used this app for a couple years, and until recently it was great. Now it freezes quite often and won't let me end or start tracking. I have had to Uninstaller and reinstall at least twice a week for the last month or so. It will also not track my milage correctly on occasion. If it keeps it up I will have to find a more reliable app, as I drive for a living and need my milage for tax purposes.

I've had the app for only 2 weeks, so can't attest to whether it helps with doing taxes, BUT it has definitely made tracking my mileage easier and has also given me an easy place to track expenses and income which should make things easier when it IS time to pay (I'll post an update once that is finished). NOTE: take time to get familiar with it; you can document income, mileage, gas expenses, oil changes, and so much more! For that convenience alone, it's worth the download!

The app worked great for years until this last update in December of 2023. The app takes forever to start tracking. Sometimes, it doesn't track after a full day. It even takes forever to stop tracking, and It won't stop tracking unless it is force stopped. It used to be the best tracking app out there until the last update a few weeks ago. No longer a 5 star app.

I just started with the app. I love the light weight design. It would be ideal to add vehicle maintenance to the expenses section for rideshare drivers since we can write off all vehicle maintenance now and save that way. I understand mileage is tracked and expensed that way as well, but you could at least give us the option to which expense we want to use during tax season. Tired of getting asked if I'm driving for work sitting in my room, but not my actual car.

This app DOES NOT automatically track your miles. You still have to manually turn on and off the tracker. Automatically means I don't have to. Automatically would mean I tag which trips were for work and which were for personal at a later time,, end of day/week. App is full of ads in your face, no real user dashboard. Don't waste your time. I'll be uninstalling this app immediately!

The app is easy to use. I love that it updates me on my potential tax liability and deduction. The one thing I hope they can update is the selection of the date range. The delivery app I use tracks a two week period that goes from Sundays to Saturdays. Stride only lets you select a Monday Sunday week. It needs to be more fluid with the date range selection. Other than that, loving the app so far. This will be my second or third week using it.

Since the latest update, it's not tracking my mileage in real time. When I select that I'm done driving, it takes forever to catch up to my current location (home) if it does at all. I usually end up having to force stop the app and then I lose all the mileage for the day. I've been using Stride for almost 8 years and I've never had any problems until the new update. Not very happy

Buggy! It was great at first, but then I started getting straight lines on my mileage. I tried the tips they suggested, but it still works fine one minute, then straight lines the next. It's too bad, I really liked this free app because it was so user-friendly. Now I'm paying to use another app which I don't even like that much, but it's more reliable.

Doesn't record my mileage. I turned on the app, selected to track miles, then at the end of my workday, I find it didn't record my mileage quite possibly because I live in and work in the mountains. Apparently this app won't work unless you have signal at all times. Doesn't work offline. Not ideal for traffic control people who rely on this to track how much driving occurred but n the course of the day to be reimbursed. Will be searching for another.

Really good at tracking miles so far and being able to go in and add missed miles is really nice! Just be sure to try to track as you drive as it becomes harder to add them in the longer you wait. I also really like how you can estimate your taxes by putting in your income for each week. If the amount I have to pay in taxes is higher than what the app says, I will come back and modify my rating appropriately based on how far off the amount is from the predicted.

After adding the app and connecting accounts, I logged them in so the app could do its thing, but it just sat there with a spinning wheel. I finally gave up... only to realize minutes later that I was locked out of all of my accounts until the next day; 18 hours on a weekend. According to my bank, a Pin Reset had been requested by the "new device" that was accessing my accounts. The only "new device" was Stride and it was definitely the only thing accessing my accounts.

I spent years using this app to track my mileage and now I can't rely on it to work properly because of an update. Whatever you do don't update the app unless you absolutely have to! I think this app still has some use though. Just avoid the automated mileage tracker at all costs and manually read off of your car's trip odometer at the end of every work day.

I do not recommend stride, I have had several issues with using stride number 1. over 20 dates came like this ####. Number 2 the job delivery was missing from the job column. Number 3. The details on over 5 deliveries was blank. I emailed this to customer support, The answer was that I must have went in and manual tried to edit the job, this was not the case, as it was automatic entry by the app. If this was not a free app, I would not use it or recommend it. Now I manually have to correct.

Fairly decent app. One major problem I have is I cannot name the "Other" category. What if I have 2 jobs that both fit in that category? First of all, I can't choose more than 1 "Other" category. Second, if I could choose more than 1, I can't rename them to keep my expenses separate. If this could be resolved, this app would receive 5 stars.

I loved this app... up until I lost all my income and mileage data. I was working on a particularly rainy day (those are bread-and-butter days for shoppers) when, after a delivery, I couldn't find the app on my home page. Needless to say, I accidentally deleted the app!!!! I quickly downloaded it again, tried to remember my login, and when my profile loaded up, I was horrified to find 0.00 deductibles!!! Nothing! Nothing was stored or restorable. This was gut wrenching!

Edit: Fixed relatively quickly with good communication. Updating to 5 stars - best mileage tracker I've found. App is broken as confirmed by other users. I'm technically savvy and this is not on my end. Have to leave for another service. Will update review if resolved in a reasonable timeframe, but it's already been a few days for what is a mission critical application for many here.

Has some great features but features don't mean anything when the app doesn't track half of your miles. It tracked my time but registered me as going an hour longer than I did. It tracked half my route but somehow managed to not register the other half. I can't even edit my miles. I was using two other tracking apps at the same time and that's how i know how off it is. I'll be looking for another app as i need something reliable.

I've been using this app for a few months. I'm giving 4 stars because I can live with some issues like taking forever to get my location or losing my location mid trip. It takes a few minutes to pull up the miles but so far it always has calculated the miles correctly. 1. For a free app this is awesome and it has a lot of features. 2. I love that I can go to the computer to download pics of my receipts, expense & mileage spreadsheet to goggle docs. 3. I do wish they would fix the location bugs.

The app worked perfectly a little over a week ago. I updated it and it stopped working. Stride had a new update and I updated it again. It's still not working. It just randomly stops tracking miles. The map doesn't load. It's not tracking the correct miles. I have to upload my miles manually. I've been using this app as a Rideshare driver, 200,000 miles, since June of 2017 with no problems. It always worked perfectly until the new update about a week ago. Just put the app back the way it was.

What the absolute $@%r of an update. Doesn't track properly at all, won't save, can't finish the trips, the app just locks up... Yesterday's tracking updated on its own 4 times today... and put the miles in all 4 times and they were all different. Did 960 miles in 1 day ... The fix is simple, roll back to the version that actually worked. Uninstall and reinstall did nothing, its still unresponsive.

I already hated the pop ups and notifications advertising health insurance, but since the new year, tracking my drives is now a problem. The ONE THING I've needed this app for now has lag for its tracking. Yes, I've given battery permissions. Takes up to an HOUR to catch up and end the tracked miles. Slurps up all my battery as well. Recommendations for a better milage tracker anyone?

I have used this app for years and really love it. I guess recently there are issues with the mileage tracker that is affecting some Android users. It is extremely important that I have this for work. I am currently tracking mileage manually, because I want to stay loyal and not have to download something different. I am hoping that this will be resolved quickly and I'm also hoping that there will be some way for us to go in and enter our mileage manually for the time period that it was down.

It's a great app to track your mileage, however, the older version I thought was better. If you forgot to track your mileage to a job the older version used to let you put in an address and search for the location you were at. The new version only let you record the mileage you are missing. Other than that I would have given this app 5 stars.

I've been using it for several years to track my mileage for Rideshare, and mostly it's been good, but... I really don't like the new font changes, makes things harder to read, etc. And every once in a while it completely messes up and misses a bunch of miles. I just went 175 miles and it only tracked 130 because it would lose the GPS location, then a mile or two later it would catch up and jump to the new spot, skipping over a bunch or turns with a straight line.

I like this app. It is really useful in tracking the mileage for a run. However, after being audited, I would like to make one recommendation. the IRS does not accept random trip maps. They also want to see actual mileage on your car for each trip and how it aligns to your mileage claim. I had over $3000 in deductions disqualified because I did not have that evidence. My recommendation would be to add an option to record start and end odometer and export to excel options.

I don't know what happened, I have used this app for a good 3 1/2 -4 years and it had never gave me problems. Since this last update, I am CONSTANTLY having issues. The app crashes or doesn't track my miles. It's become a daily thing. This is going to screw up my taxes. I am afraid if it's not fixed by the end of the year, I'm switching to a different app that works properly. I can not afford to have this happening.

I've been using Stride for 4 years and it worked great until the most recent update. Now it keeps crashing when I try to view my transactions which is making it difficult for me to review in order to do my taxes. I shouldn't have updated the app but it wouldn't let me use the older version. **edit: After Uninstalling and reinstalling it seems to work again**

I've been using this for years but something happened in the last update. When you look at past trips and select the map to zoom on your past travel path, the app crashes and closes. Also it still reminds me everyday when I start to drive to turn on the app,.. Very convenient! But for some reason it stopped doing the reverse, asking me if I have stopped driving after I sit still for an hour. I end up forgetting to turn it off and leaving it running all night. What happened to this great feature?

Works well as far as I can tell. You just have to remember to turn it on/off manually. There is an option for it to send you a notification when it detects car movement. It then reminds you if you want to log a drive, which is very helpful. But, the notifications don't pop up 60% of the time. Or they pop up at a completely random time halfway through my drive.

Dont waste your time with this app. Have used it for over 3 years. The app worked very well in the past. I loved it! But now it doesn't keep up with my mileage accurately. It's still on and active but will not calculate correctly and jumps from one location to another. Terrible tracker.. don't waste your time...find a different app. I'm looking into other trackers now 😫😫

The app was working great until about the last few updates. The tracking miles feature does not work correctly anymore, which is really frustrated because that's all I use this app for. It won't track miles turn-by-turn like it was designed to do. Now it will only track the distance between wherever you started the tracking and end the tracking. I'll be looking for another app if it isn't fixed in the next update.

I've used Stride for yrs now. I really appreciate that it is free. However, often times the app will crash. It's a bit of a hassle to force stop on the app and have to re-try again. This past week, the app has stopped working. It will no longer log my miles, even though the app seems to be running. It keeps saying "null". Even when I uninstalled & logged back in...nothing! Is it bc of the update? Idk, but it's severely frustrating. Please fix it.

Haven't had a problem for well over a year. With the update, the tracker only logged half of the miles driven yesterday. Miles have been inaccurate every day since update. If this isn't fixed this week, I'll have no choice but to try a different mileage tracker. I must say that I don't much care for the new look either.

Ever since I joined Stride to track my mileage, the app will not stop harassing me about signing up for health insurance through them. At first they were sending direct notifications to my phone, non-stop. Even though I blocked those, they continue harassing me about it when I open the app. I already have health insurance. But there is nowhere to indicate that, or turn off those notifications. Obviously Stride benefits when you choose health insurance through them, which is why they do this.

I would prefer to add my income weekly. Where did that option go? I work everyday and most of the time I forget to add it for the week, life happens. To catch up would take me hours of going back and forth and adding multiple shifts for one day, somedays. Making it to where we have the option of picking the days for that week would be great if it worked. I have emailed separately and even followed the advice on the outdated auto email sent. All in all I feel that the update is inconvenient

Deduction history is buggy and unreliable and has been for a while. It does not like switching between different years or trying to view the most recent year. It frequently includes deductions from a previous year in a couple different ways, and will give you the wrong mileage and deduction. This has caused me to enter the wrong mileage in my accounting software multiple times when I didn't realize it was bugging out. I might have to switch to something else.

Fails to track mileage! I manually set the app to track miles, yet most the time it tracks nothing and when I go back in to the app to end my driving session the end tracking button is gone! In fact the past 2 days it has tracked ZERO miles due to this issue. Sometimes when the end tracking button is present, I tap to end driving and it starts showing my driving session in the map like a replay in real time, then after it finishes its calculations there are ZERO miles tracked. It's also laggy!

App is broken AF. When tracking miles, often shows diagonal paths and doesn't follow streets. Makes up "flyover" routes when going over water. My mileage is way higher than what the app actually tracks because of this issue. I start and stop the tracker frequently, but sometimes it doesn't save/record my trips whatsoever. Going to be looking into other apps to use in the future instead.

This is getting frustrating. I have been using Stride for years. Lately when I open the app it just spins and takes forever to start my drive. I have Uninstaller it and reinstalled it seveveral times with the same results. I have filled out that I amcoved with insurance through the VA several times yet it still asks me. I know this is a free app but come on!!! Please fix this!!!!!!

1. It didn't work well since a recent update. The tracking stops at some spot without moving even I driving. I already drove from A to B, and it still froze at A. End up the total mileage was shorter than actual. 2. It only shows $ amount, Not mileage at the screen of pop up message. I wanna track mileage, Not deducted amount during driving. OK? 3. Sometimes when I end a trip, it automatically starts a new trip, even I don't want to. Please fix all these bugs. Thanks!

The update to Stride has made it VERY difficult for me to input my income and deductions because the dates Don't add up, and they change it automatically to reflect a beginning week date instead. When I tried to complete my 2023 information it was too confusing, it either wouldn't input at all, or put it in the wrong date based on my last entry and I had to give up! Not good for someone who needs to itemize their deductions and back track to edit.

Does not track accurately on a consistent basis. At times, tracks well, showing route and miles. At others, stops tracking miles on ownit's own, so when I've finished a day of driving 180 miles (luckily in use a separate log), it might show less than half. At times GPS shows diagonal line as if you drove diagonally across multiple blocks thus inaccurately capturing miles. Feeling like what's the point of using app of I have to log my miles separately for accuracy. Nice features if it worked.

This app is one of the worst pieces of garbage in the Google Play Store. It has botched the record-keeping of thousands of my work miles over the past three months. You know what their own customer support told me? If you close the app it messes up the tracking. If you restart your phone it messes up the tracking. And guess what, nowhere in their technical support documents does it tell you that. It would take me days if not weeks to reconstruct all of this. Utter and complete useless waste.

All I use it for is choosing what miles I track and it works great at least %95 of the time for that. It will sometimes loose a signal and the trip will look like I flew to my destination. I also wish it were easier to switch between trips while in the edit mode. Right now I have to exit in and out to double check my edits. Other than that, I love this app!!!

Instant crash after hitting "I'm done driving" on a 50 mile trip. Could not use the app again, had to uninstall and reinstall, but the trip is gone, like it ever existed. This is pathetic Even on longer trips, 1-3 hours, sometimes I need to force stop the app for it to function again. It would not let me hit "I'm done driving".

I really wish there were ways to change what you know they are doing wrong, like the tax rate and the money per mile. i put in my zip code but all the info is wrong so now i have to still do the math to find out what i need to save to pay back and how much my deductions really are but hey its a free app. I'll give 5 stars when i can customize, and it gives the correct information.

Tracking never works, it always makes a straight line from paint A to point b as if I'm flying across the city loosing about half of my actual miles driven, and now the tracker is stuck on and I can't turn it off. it would be nice is devs focused more on the milage tracking over trying to push add on like signing up for hearhcare and personal loans.

Can sign up. When I put my info in, and press sign up, I get a reply. Bummer! Something went wrong on our end . Please try again in a minute. I have been trying for days now. I have installed and uninstalled, turned my phone off and on. Still same message. Do you have any ideal what's wrong? I really don't won't to rate the app, haven't had a chance to use it.

Recent "update" destroyed this app. No longer tracks miles yet uses 20% of my battery. On top of losing all my data for the year at the end of the year, there are a ton more intrusive ads. I'll pay for a competitor's app and I've never paid for an app before. They give empty excuses about needing to conform to new android specs but it's just poor work all the way around.

Was working... I used this app to track my mileage. I tracked it manually by entering the information myself and it was working great for me, but now I receive the error "Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a minute." I've tried contacting the developer 3 different ways to advise of this issue as I really rely on this app to track my mileage but they have been unresponsive.

the report it emails is very vague it doesn't report the actual mileage or any other detail it just reports the amount of money that's deductible. it would seems to me that the IRS will want something a little more detailed than that. Not sure if this is a good app or not. Updated it and it stopped working. It asked for login credentials but doesnt work after I put the password in. Try resetting the password eird and still doesn't work. Waste of time. I'm deleting it.

It's a decent app. No real complaints so far. One thing that would make it better is if you could enter your income by shift or day instead of weekly. The weeks they provide don't follow the weeks that I get paid so I end up having to recalculate to include days that fall in the apps week. It's a bit confusing this way.

Tried several times to add my bank account. Got through the log in, verified the account, selected the account and Stride gave a message "Bummer, something happened on our end. Please wait a few minutes and try again." Well, I got tired if trying and lost faith in this apps ability to be reliable. Uninstalled. 1st impressions count DEV team.

I've used this app for the last few weeks and it's been everything I needed. I mainly use this for mile tracking, haven't messed with expense reporting etc... but it's easy enough to track miles and run in the background. If you forget to track a trip you can enter miles manually, and it's nice to see deductions adding up for my work miles. And it's free which is a plus.

The mileage feature doesnt work anymore. I'm screwed for January through May 2019. I'll have to go back and recalculate everything myself. It worked fine in 2018 and then there was a beta version and now this piece of junk. When I stop the miles, the clock doesn't stop so I have 10 mile trips that show they took 18 hours. Just now I had an 8 mile trip that showed up as .96 miles. Ugh.

Stride Tax is good for tracking my expenses & Receipts, eliminates a lot of receipts on my desk.  I only wish that your able to edit some of the category's to a specific time (work cloths, cell phone are some examples).  One thing that I do not like is tracking miles.  I use MileIQ, best tracking miles ever and no complaints on that. Recommend Stride Tax on expenses and Receipts, but miles will be MileIQ all the way.

It was easy to setup and to use. Keeps weekly and yearly totals does the estimated tax owed the whole nine yards. I only wish is that it would recognize immediately when you start driving and ask if you're working. As it is it asks 20 minutes later. Still all in all a very helpful app. Oh yeah and the perks, I think that's where it's at, offers different types of insurance to choose from to suit your needs.

This App used to track miles well. Now with the latest update it has been not tracking miles well and flat out not recording trips that were factually tracked by it. Ridiculous. Also the annoying popping up notifications for health insurance and other services are highly unproductive, the close button doesn't work well so it takes you the advertising website. Biggest thing is the failure to record trips since the last update, you have one job to do!

I'm really enjoying this app here it is making my day today commuting and work easier than it has been. No more riding every single thing down no matter what. It's definitely a shortcut that takes alot of my frusteration away that is normally caused by having to log every single step of my commuting time daily. It takes a lot of time to do that and it's hard to find the time to write everything down like we used to do. This app is New Age and I liked it. Keep on tracking you cool ass app you

Doesn't track mileage correctly, it'll stop tracking miles in the middle of a drive and restart tracking when I open the app again. Been losing a lot of miles because of this. I have location permission set for this app but it turns off/times out after driving about 30 mins. Guess I won't get my full deductions this year for lost miles. Will give it another week if it keeps this up guess I'm giving another app a shot. Never had this problem last year.

I actually love this app and recommend it to all my friends. I can close it and it runs in the background properly tracking my miles. The tax calculator is so useful too. I'm withholding the 5th star until they give me a way to turn off their in app pop ups. Not ads but tips like "healthcare plans" and "battery saver". I have healthcare and I already optimized the app in my Android settings for battery usage. Every time I finish a drive I still get these redundant popups. Fix that please.

That's the simplest way I found to track my miles. I like that I can track miles for my insurance business and separate tracking for my ride share that I do occasionally. I also like that it doesn't automatically track every single mile. You just have to remember to turn it on when you start. I also like that you can track expenses and other things like that on here as well

It used to give more details, and for some reason in the middle of my shift suddenly I learn to fly a plane. I missed out on probably 50 miles of tracking last night, driving all over the West side of Atlanta. This app isn't entirely trustworthy, so use your car mileage tracker to add the difference. Not sure what happened to this app.

Edit: it worked pretty well before the last big update where they changed a bunch of cosmetic stuff and now it either doesn't track at all or you get a straight line from point A to point B as if I flew there. You can still manually enter miles, but the whole point was to be able to hit a button and it does that leg work for you. I know I'm not the only one having this issue, so hopefully they fix it soon.

Highly disappointed since the update. I keep getting a notification asking if I'm driving for work and when I tap "yes" a few minutes later I'll get another notification. When I pulled up the app I could see it wasn't tracking my mileage. Didn't realize it until today so I missed out on tracking my mileage for yesterday and today. Don't do an update if it's not going to work!

Very disappointed with this app. Randomly stops tracking miles during work, causing mileage to be inaccurate. Already takes like 4 button clicks to start tracking, so IF it even notifies me to start tracking during deliveries, I have to click buttons while driving. Often there is no notification, so no clue if it's still tracking or not until I find out way later. Also, by Stride's calculations for taxes, pretty much all earnings go to taxes. Uninstalling and going back to pen and paper.

I'd love to give 5 stars because Stride is a totally necessary part of tracking my expenses & mileage for Lyft & I've loved it when doing Postmates too. My one issue is the times it decides randomly to not track anything after I've been online for awhile. Uninstalling always corrects this, but it'd be nice if it could stay 100% reliable for longer than a couple of months. Otherwise, super useful app, great for organization.

serpPaaQuestions: What is the best free mileage tracking app?
Can I track mileage on my phone?
How can I track my mileage for work for free?
Is a mileage tracker app worth it?
serpRelatedSearches: Free mileage tracker app for iPhone

playStoreReviews.text: A truly wonderful and extremely useful application. I used it and still use it to manage more than 50 sites simultaneously, knowing that they are sites for implementing projects of different natures. But thanks to this application, I was able to manage and follow the workflow in all the sites in an easy and enjoyable way, in addition to following the precise work details in each project, as the application allows me to do so very easily.

Have had a good experience using Site Diary. Have been using the app for the past year. In the past seemed to have some bugs but they have seemed to work out. One suggestion I would make is to add units in the material tab when entering quantities. Just basic units (ex. LF, CY, SF, EA, ...)
Not reliable! I lost my entry due to a faulty event. I see the entry but i cannot open it. I can only delete it.
Tried to test use the App. couldn't get past registration age. Error message; contact support with no link given. Maybe it is a great App or not.
Great app for on-site activity recording and team collaboration. Still a few bugs to fix but it's only the beta version..
Decent app to keep track over your work progress , manpower and equipment , it helps to organise and plan your next day better .
Great idea, but to slow and I have just lost a weeks logs. Has issues saving names and titles. Using a Samsung android.
Handy for out on site. Easier to write on the app there and then rather than write it down and fill the diary in layer.
Good concept but functionality poor (e.g. filtering does not work - has a feel of being implemented before fully developed/tested. Not worth paying for.
Saves me time on my daily reports. Also it is intuitive and easy to use.
Poor functionality and it won't even let you delete your account. This is very dangerous for a company as it saves business information that might get into third-party hands.
Always showing error. Data not sync properly
The best overall free building site diary. Used to track progress on my own house construction site.
sounded like a great app idea, went to register and orginazation was mispelled, think I'll pass
Excellent app, really useful. Definitely recommend.
Too many glitches. Couldn't even start a project
lost all site diary entries, very un happy
some options is good have to add some more things
Even the trial doesn't work. Cannot access as Not Authorised.
I don't like
Sync pending is late
OK
Not usuful

For day to day iournal keeping this app is fine. But when you need to set it up on a new device, and download years worth of entries, it's not good. The problem is it will only download/sync about 275 at a time, requiring you to monitor its progress and keep restarting the download. When vou have thousands of entries, this is time consuming and tedious . After using Journey for 8 or 9 years, I'm disappointed to find that this hasn't been fixed yet

Love this for quick notes, snapshots, shower thoughts. Ideal quick journal app. edit Sept 2025 I still love this app. Sometimes I use it more than others, going weeks or months without writing anything and then coming back to it. Lately I've been noticing how much of my day to day life I don't remember, names of people I met once a few years ago, places I've been, which of our kids did or said what. Writing daily about what my day and what I'm hoping to do next has been nice.

For day to day journal keeping, this app is fine. But when you need to set it up on a new device, and download years worth of entries, it's not good. The problem is it will only download/sync about 275 at a time, requiring you to monitor its progress and keep restarting the download. When you have thousands of entries, this is time consuming and tedious. After using Journey for 8 or 9 years, I'm disappointed to find that this hasn't been fixed yet.

Moved to Upnote - great alternative! I purchased the full Journey app 8 or 9 years ago and it was supposed to include everything for life. However, every couple of years they seem to hose the database they use for storing member information and I have to contact them to get my paid membership back. This time around they are refusing to reinstate my membership because I don't have a purchase receipt from 9 years ago and are insisting I buy it again. App used to be great, now kinda mid. No thanks.

I've used this app for 10 years now, paid for the premium version and all... I wanted to start using the web version as well because typing on my phone hurts my hands these days. Unfortunately, paying for this app gets you no access on the web app, and you have to purchase a new *subscription* that also unlocks premium features on the app (which I already paid for). I am looking for an alternative writing app, I'm so disappointed.

I've been using this app for about 8 years now. Pros: Tagging system, easy to use, and you can now add photos AND videos to the same entry. Cons: I got the premium version years ago so I could access my journal online, but now that feature is part of the new subscription plan. No multiple journal feature; multiple drives isn't the same. Biggest issue: When I transferred my journal to a new phone, my older entries were missing. Customer support hasn't helped. Looking for a new app now.

It was good as a simple digital journal, but my Google Drive is full so I can't back up my entries anymore, and I just found out that there is no way to switch to a different Google Drive. I'd have to bulk download all the entries, delete my current account, create a new one with the new Google drive, and then upload the bulk downloaded zip file to be able to back it up in the new drive...and the bulk download is a feature only available if you pay for a premium membership! Not using it anymore.

This App sounded great, after comparing it to the others I tried it out. Within days I have found data missing. Time wasted creating templates, and entering data only to come the next day and find it's gone. I made sure to save and monitor that action. There is a definite bug in this App, I will not invest future time or have my data held in a system that will cause loss. It is also not a well supported App, no refunds buyer beware! I'm taking the loss of funds now and discontinuing.

I searched the app store for the "Day One" Journal, ready to buy b/c it had been recommended to me. After purchase, I soon realized that this app showed up as a similarly styled icon "ad" just above Day One. I thought I had clicked Day One and installed it. I had instead clicked this deceptive ad and bought a year subscription. It's my own fault, I should have slowed down. But Google won't grant my refund request. I can't help but feel scammed. I still bought Day One and it's awesome.

I've tried deleting my account and cancelling the subscription multiple times without success. I haven't used the app in nearly a year I've tried talking to someone about it but I just get placed in a queue that says I'll get an email when they respond but I never receive an email. Now I've been charged (twice as much as the subscription was originally by the way) and I just want my money back and my account deleted. I don't understand why this is so difficult.

Easy to use and like the prompt questions. I usually forget it exists though and only write sporadic entries. Like that I can add pictures to my diary entries too. However, I thought that I bought a lifetime version of it and not have to pay each year. Of I'd known that in the beginning, I'd probably chose not to enter this app at all. It's simply too expensive.

I really like the app and should probably just dish out the cash for premium. However, using the free version, they advertise the premium soooo much it is extremely annoying. You can't hardly do anything without having to close a premium ad. Edit: I did dish out the cash for premium and I'm glad I did. It has been a great experience, online and everything. One improvement would be that some of the exports have weird formatting, and one of them, I couldn't see the dates.

I like the app. A downside is the journal does not have an auto save and I've lost a few entries because I forgot to hit the checkmark to save my work. A big plus is that I don't need WiFi to use the app. Nov 21,2024. Two years since my first review. Journey continues to improve. It meets my needs. I especially like the ability to post images to my journals. It's a travel-log, and I can view all the images at once, instead of having to view each separate journal.

I've always been someone that journals, but have lost some through the years. This syncs up regularly and protects my entries from going missing. Also has really cool add-ons like location and mood tracker. Love it!!! Update: still loving it!! Been using this app since 2018, it's 2024 & I've just this year decided to pay for the advanced version. Works really well even if you don't want to pay for it though! Highly recommend!

I really enjoy Journey and I've been using it for about a couple of years now. It's aesthetically pleasing and soothing and the latest editor features are fantastic. What I don't like about it are the costs for accessing the different platforms. When I first started using Journey, I unlocked premium membership for the Android app only to find out that I had to pay for the Chrome app, which I did. Recently, I learned that if I want to use the web version, then I have to pay again. It's unfair.

This app is beautiful in its simplicity. I have a thought, or a list, and i can quickly jot it down. You can add emotions, tags, pictures, and probably more... The kids do something adorable, I can take a pic and create memory. The entire world doesn't need to know. Anyway, simple easy to use app to track and journal.

Hi, so I installed this app yesterday. Since I'm allowed to upload videos I was thinking, oh, this would be a nice way to make a video diary. I bought the upgrade to see if the maximum size of a video would increase a bit, but it didnt... I cant upload videos that are more than a minute after editing them a little... I dont think I'm going to continue this, but only because of that. I mean all in all, this app is ingenious, but the video attachment option could be upgraded a bit to allow for slightly larger files with the purchase of an upgrade. 😟

This app has been exactly what I've been looking for. I'm using it to track my health as opposed to just straight journaling. I use it along with voice input to make it easy to track water intake, what foods I'm eating, headaches, and other issues. It takes care of tracking the date and the time and the location. It also allows me to tag each entry so later I can pull all of my entries about water, for instance, if I want to see how much I've drunk in a day.

Everything I ever wanted in a journaling app. Starting with easy mood logging, geotagging, photos.... Based on geotag, automatically calcs weather for that day. Can't wait to use it for a year, so it shows me what I was doing on that day a year ago. Just a ton of features in a slick package. Now I just need to remember to update it.....

So far there are ads whenever you interact with the app, but their own ads, not a third party. I'm Ok with it, but they are too often. I understand that they want to promote their services, but it's nice to give a break once in a while. Also their lifetime subscription is too high... If they gave out more of a discount and more often, then it would be a nice incentive to buy. I like the app overall, I'll make another review later.

Great journalling app. The layout and everything is pretty intuitive, and I haven't really encountered any bugs. One thing I'd like to possibly see is a way for us to create and insert our own templates. Every day I like to write down under specific headers what I did yesterday, what I learned, what I think I should've done differently, etc, and I'm forced to copy all that I wrote down the entry before and reuse my headers. It'd be nice to just be able to have a way to paste down my template from one button instead of going through the process of opening my previous entry, copy pasting it into my current entry, and then replacing the body with my current entry.

Update: So after almost 45 days since downloading I have about 18 entries (a couple were 2 short ones from same day) but that's an average of around every 3 days! Happy w/ the interface I mostly use the speech to text entry method haven't really added to yet Great for a journal/diary Used to write ✍️ mine occasionally but this is helpful as 1. You can use voice to text 2. You carry phone around so it's right there! May even read in some of my old journal entries on same days but past year's!?

Update from Feb. 5, 2023: I found out sync works with Google Drive. Old review: Nice app for the price (free!). Fits my needs for basic writing. I haven't lost data and I can't complain. I would advise backing up content to other apps every once in a little while. I don't quite understand how sync works with this app and where data is saved.

I've been using the app for a couple of years and really love it. I love journaling but I would always go so long between entries because I would get lazy. I still don't journal everyday like I should but with this app I'm doing much better. I love that I can put pictures for the day, that it has automatic location and temperature, so when I look back in my journal all that information was automatically put in.

I've used a Hobonichi Techo for years but decided to see what digital items are out there. Journey has immediately and completely replaced my Hobonichi. It's exactly what I was looking for. There are so many nice, thoughtful touches. Like if you add a photo to a journal entry it then asks you if you want to set the journal entry time to the time the picture was taken. That's great!

I was hesitant to pay for the membership, but I like this app a lot. I use it for a Mood Chart and being able to tag entries and see what tags lead to what moods has been very helpful. I also use the microphone a lot to record visualizations from the DBT workbook, listen to them, and journal about it. I ALSO use it as a foodlog and attach photos of my food over the day to the entries. Overall, the app is well-designed and clean. I've recommended it to all my friends.

I've used Journey off and on for a long time. I love the simple but feature-filled text editor, how you can attach files, the layout and UI, and the fact that you can export your entries in different formats. But what I love more than anything else is that you can buy a lifetime version of the pro membership. Any good software that isn't going to force me to pay them every month for the rest of my life is gold in my book. The price is worth it. The free version is decent too, so try that first

So useful. I keep things in Journey that I need to refer to on a regular basis as will as my personal journal and poetry stuff. BTW- I have never upgraded, so I use the free version. It may not have all the nifty features and I do get a short sales pitch every time I login, but i just click "No thanks". I enjoy the bennies and don't have any of the headaches other people write about in their reviews.

The Best App for Journaling! I cant imagine anything better than this app! I love the simplicity, easy interface, customization, no annoying ads whatsoever (I bought premium out-the-gate so I'm not sure about the free side), and the pay once and have it forever unless you chose to buy a $2 membership for addons that arent nessesity but can be a nicety depending on your purpose/goals using the app. I've used this app everyday for the past year and I'd recommend it to anyone and everyone!

I love using this app. It is simple to add entries. I read my words right off it in recording studio. Then, a year of not using this app, it did seem I lost my information, and it seemed at first all was lost. Then I wrote customer service, and they helped me know the entries were in the cloud. I was so happy today to find out I was wrong, silly me. I also like this app because you can put entries in on the phone on the go or at home on the computer.

Awful. It is honestly not as great as I thought it would be for how expensive it is. Tricky too. Once I realized I was unsatisfied, I canceled my subscription. OR SO I THOUGHT. There is some backwards way they want you to cancel it to make it impossible. I thought I did that over 8 months ago, but I just found out they charged me for another year. They automatically turn on auto renewal for payments and do not tell you. Then they charge you without ever sending a notice. Do not recommend.

This is a great app! I love that it syncs across devices, and find I use it often because it's always readily available. The only wish I have is that you could have separate journals, like notebooks, that you could use for different things... but I kind of work around that with great tags, so I can still pull out all the related items.

Miserable app & user experience. Deceitful company, awful, use anything or anyone else. I stopped using Journey 1 month in after purchasing an annual subscription, and when my subscription auto-renewed (because they make it nearly-impossible to find a place to cancel your subscription), I reached out to the company within 30 minutes of auto-renewal to ask for a refund because I didn't want to continue using the service. They told me to pound sand and they'll never give a dollar back. They're bad

This is an excellent app to track daily emotions and events. it is easy to use, I've been using it for almost 4 years, though not a consistently as i should. It has all that you need, can give you reminders and because it saves to Google, you can change phones and still have your diary. I'm curious how it's going to look as time goes on. i think it will be awesome to see.

I love this journl, been using it for years now :) I have it on my phone, PC and chromebook and it's served many different purposes. From keeping recipies to writing for daily prompts to just jotting notes. I especially love the reminder you can set, frequency and time of day. And being able to attach pics straight from your phone? Priceless. You can even get it to prompt you whenever you take a new pic, asking if you want to write about it. I have a lifetime subscription for a reason :)

I give it a 4.75! I was introduced to this app a few years ago. I take so many photos, they're like my journal. I love that I can get caught up on memories and Journey suggests changing the date of the entry to when my attached photos were taken. I use this app when I make photobooks for my children because I can search for their names and find entries related to stories about them. I do wish there was an option to download the journal entries withOUT photos for easier printing though...

I like this app overall but I don't like how it's handling gallery. Imagine if you'd like to add pics that you took a month ago. The app will let you open the gallery where you can see every recent saved picture, but it will load only a limited amount of them, in most cases it will not load what you were looking for. Second way - open a files where it will let you add pics from camera folder but only ONE BY ONE, and no it will not remember where you left, you'll have to scroll all over again.

LOVE IT! Firstly, the upgrade is affordable and worth it! I used to journal all the time and I fell out of habit as I got older. I still wish I'd take the time to put pen to paper but this allows me to feel like I've put my thoughts somewhere. I can sync it to my Google account so it's never lost, add pics, incorporate Google fit, set reminders, I even use it for my food journal entries. And I love the looking at atlas after my trips! This app really got me into journaling again. Thank you!

I am at over 1300 days of writing in my journal every day and I love that it syncs to the Internet. Would like an option to copy multiple days worth of entries into a Microsoft Word Document or Google Doc so I can more easily share my entries. One small request, could you please add an "undo" feature? Too many times I have typed up a long journal entry, then I accidentally double tap the screen, causing the entire entry to be highlighted, then I type a letter and it deletes it all.

For the most part the app is good. I still prefer using the sun version I'm most cases as it is a little easier to use. One of the things I really like about the app is the ability to dictate my thoughts rather than trying which gives my fingers s chance to relax after s long day working on computers. Due to the whole pandemic thing I don't get out much, although I think of I was more monitoring able to make entries on the go would increase my user of the app. We'll see how that goes.

Sadly I need to downgrade my review. I'm a premium app user who has been using the android app on my Chromebook for a while now. A nice small laptop with a keyboard to easily create entries. Recent updts have broken my ability to use this on this device. I've tried the uninstall, delete data & reinstall. Even though I'm a premium user I can't use my premium features on the Chrome browser without paying a monthly fee. I wonder if that's the motivation for breaking the app on the Chromebook.

I love this journal. It does everything I want a journal to do and more. You can put tags on your entries and search them up later! I went ahead and bought the lifetime of premium because I liked the benefits it came with and it wasn't all that expensive. My only issue is the location picker for the entries. You have some that aren't even available anymore, but its still listed. Why? A small eyesore, but the app is still great

not free - it's like $3.49 a month , which must be billed annually (iow you cant pay monthly, you have to pay the roughly $42 annual fee at once. Needless to say, I uninstalled it, so I dont really know much more about the app itself. What I DO know, however, is that there are far too many FREE journal/notebook apps that are super cute & readily available to justify spending money on this one.

A bit of a miss. Looking for a journaling app, and this one seemed to be well liked, buy to have to pay a subscription fee to have even a single additional journal really killed it for me. I could understand having to pay a one time fee, maybe even 99 cents per, but not a freaking subscription fee. Nothing in the subscription made me want it anymore either. Also, the text editor was a bit garbage, causing words that I backspace into to duplicate, making writing the journal very difficult.

I love this app! instead of posting to Facebook, or in addition to posting to Facebook, I post to Journey. It's so easy to put my thoughts down with pictures. I also use talk to text so that it goes so much faster. I wish this was available when my kids were little, so I could dictate the cute things they said. now I dictate what the grandkids say. It's great and easy!!

I started using this app in 2018 after unfortunate life events caused me to lose 20 years of handwritten journals. If I was going to start over, it had to be digital. This app is everything you need. Not only does your writing save to the cloud, but the app syncs flawlessly from one device to another. New phone? No problem. Writing on a tablet sometimes? No entry left behind. You can attach media, tag entries, set reminders, etc. Buy the upgrade. It's once a year & worth it!

What more can I say. Does everything I want and more. Great to be able to share with my counselor too. Definitely like the reminder as my days are so hectic, I usually forget to journal. Gives me some 'me' time to take care of myself. 4/6/20 would like to add that I was offered a discount for update but was charged full price! Scam!!!

I love that I can use it with my S-pen, since I have painful arthritis on both my hands, which has put a damper on my love for journaling and manual activities in general. However, having a paid version, I would expect to have more personalization options, like script & other types of fonts, as well as different choices for the type & colors of writing "paper."

They are not honest and very little response from their end. There is no guarantee of service so basically no refunds if the service doesn't work for you and there are limits after you buy the full version there is another paywall for more storage later. The files are not in markdown and no way to retrieve your work. They end up owning your data and have no way to get it off their platform. Plus a lot of futures that I would like to see are missing.

Was a great app, but they've conveniently forgotten I paid for lifetime premium. This is the second time this app has forgotten it was paid for. This time, the instructions on how to "restore purchases" just takes me in a circle. I love the app otherwise, but I'm not going to pay monthly subs for something they previously agreed to sell for life on a onetime basis.

I like this enough that I pay for a yearly members. I've been able to work through some pretty hard stuff because of just how available a journal is when it's on your phone. Sometimes I plug a keyboard into my phone and just rip for hours. I do wish that I could figure out how to type journal entries in landscape mode instead of portrait when I am using my usb keyboard though...

It's an easy way to journal. When we go on trips, I find the limit of 10 photos a day very restrictive. When I go to my child's school concert, I find the one video limit restrictive. If it's storing on my phone I would think I could store more. But I like this app and am happy to journal daily with it. I am happy with my purchase.

this is a fantastic app. streamlined, easy to use. had my phone stolen and it was a relief to have all my notes backed up to this app. I use the free version and it's perfect. ads pop up asking you if you'd like to upgrade frequently but not inconveniently. although, I would definitely upgrade to a membership if it offered a filing system. I would love to see the incorporation of folders or some other organizing tool. for now, "highlighting" helps. 10/10 would recommend.

I will update later if things improve. But so far, I am very much unimpressed. Tried to use the speech to text option, and it chooses the wrong word quite often or it drops out of speech-to-text mode entirely. Or just now... I stopped journaling because it took everything I had already narrated and kept duplicating it and duplicating it. Did it probably ten times before I was able to get it to stop. Maybe more? Hopefully, it gets better.

Journey is my new favorite app. Journaling has always been very important to me (kept a handwritten one for years) and I spent a while trying different journal apps. This one is by far the best. It's easy to use, can be used across multiple devices, visually pleasing, and I love how you can tag the location and weather on each entry. I've only used this for a few weeks, but I'm really hoping this will be around for a very long time and that I can use it for years to come.

This app is easy to use and it is fun to go back and read old journal entries. I really like to be able to dictate my journal entries and add photos. I can also upload the entries to the cloud so that my journal doesn't get lost. Update: Well here I am over a year later and still using this app. I wholeheartedly would recommend it for journaling. I have been using this app for over 2.5 years now and I think it is more beneficial with time. Thanks again for developing Journey!

My experience was awful. They have two confusing demos, neither of which I wanted. I requested a refund after accidentally getting some subscription started and they made me email, fill out a form, email again, and then denied the refund. They intentionally jerked me around for 5 days. Expect terrible customer service, a confusing mess of an app, good luck trying to figure out how to not get charged $29.99 when you click "no I don't want that." They'll charge you anyway and waste your time.

I decided on this app because I was limiting my social media time and wanted something I could still write things in that my kids say and just a daily thing to keep track of my life. I wanted one where I could add photos too. Honestly, that was my favorite part of Facebook...being able to document things. So, this app has been fantastic at letting me just write things down whenever they pop in my head and it allows me to do it where it's just for me and I don't have to get on social media.

I use this app on an almost daily basis as sort of a growth picture diary of my son. It's been great so far, my only complaint would be that I can't scroll through pictures on individual days unless I click on the day and then the pictures, sometimes I don't need to read the entry but just want to browse the photo. It would also be nice to not have premium ads thrown in my face whenever I log in, but I still enjoy using the app regularly.

It used to be a lot better, I wouldn't have spent money on it if I had known they would remove the stat page in favor of the whole coaching portion there instead. The ability to visually track stuff was a big portion of why I bought premium to kinda thank them on making a good app. Like I still may use it some only because it has years of old journal entries, but I really miss that feature.

Aggressive ads and popups for their subscription service. I'd pay a small fee to buy a version to turn off the ads, but am not interested in their subscription. Additionally, basic formatting features, such as headers, lists, etc appear to be behind the pay subscription, effectively crippling an otherwise decent app. Strongly do not recommend this app at all. Confirmed after contacting support, subscription is required features such as basic formatting. Worst developer on the Play Store.

I've used this app for years now and even uploaded past journal entries into it. Sometimes I pull it out to jot down a quick thought and don't even realize how much is about to pour out. It's also good for on the spot journaling vs having to actually write in a journal. If you're someone who can't always predict exactly when you need to write it out, that's the kind of thing this app is great for.

Absolutely the best Journaling app, solely because of it's cross-platform and syncing ability. I also love that I can attach pictures and files to my entries. Does what it's supposed to do! You just have to purchase each version for Android and iOS. Having the free web version is great too for times when I am using my laptop.

I appreciate having somewhere other than social media to store my memories and photos. And I like the features that auto-record or let you select date, weather, location, etc. Works well. Would be even better if the layout could include a little more of a formatted or finished look and entries could eventually be transferred or transformed into a printable book.

I've been using this app for almost three years to record my dreams when I wake up. Other dream journal apps have small character limits which makes it difficult to write everything out, but this one is perfect. The above paragraph was from 2018. I've now been using this app for eight years, and it is now 2023. Still an amazing app and I couldn't recommend more!

Never leave reviews or purchase apps. Purchased this within an hour of using it. Over also never kept a journal before but turned to journaling as personal therapy in a difficult period in my life. Looked at a few others and the features available and ability to not have to pay a monthly subscription by ways of a one time cost to access the paid features sold me quick! Perfect app for both the seasoned journaler or a first timer like myself. Will definitely recommend this app to others!!!

I absolutely love this app! I have been using it for a year and it not only has kept me motivated to journal on a daily basis but it also brought my journal alive. I love being able to add pictures to my entries. My hubby bought me a laptop so that I didn't have to use my phone to write my entries!! I have purchased the lifetime version and I am so glad I did! If you are looking for a journaling app look no further! Journey offers so much coaching sessions, templates and much more!

Hello, I've upgraded and the bennies look very nice! Please tell me how to sync to pc without paying $20 to download. If love to put Journey on all my devices.
