playStoreReviews.text: Update: the creator reponded quickly, which is a massive plus. Patches work. i will come back and review again once Ive tried the update for a few days. This app crashes almost once every week. it completely erases my hours already put in, so I have to maintain a physical record elsewhere everyday in case the app deletes all data towards the end of the week. current crash has been on going since Thursday (12/02/26) till now, Saturday (14/02/26) with no resolution.
Sharing timesheet to email addresses but only worked once.
A very straightforward approach to managing hours worked. An easy to use app with clear functions and quick edits where need be. Recommended.
Fantastic application for record timesheet for your daily work. You can register as employee under your company and track your work record and share it too.
Used for our rental property business. Easy to use and outstanding customer service. Nothing seemed too much trouble to help.
This app has greatly improved my experience in logging my work hours with it's streamlined approach. This has made a previous daunting task much more accessible for me.
Will only work if you allow all permissions. Don't know why it need my location and access to my media files if I'm just putting in my working hours...
Fantastic app, love the new update! Super simple to use and gives you everything you need.
Can't access calendar or schedule.
Fantastic app, very streamlined
Great app

a few options I would like to make life easier but have been using it for 3 years now with no issues. Organise invoices by paid / unpaid would be useful. Colour-code invoices red / green as unpaid / paid would help with the at-a-glance finding. Also, search for all un-allocted hours - irrespective of client Possible option to set a tax year, so dates can be exported accordingly but that is a once a year thing so easy to work with. and just like that - all changes made. thank you very much!

This is a great app, I've been using it for years. One minor issue: It used to be that if you were clocked in, the time spent working showed as a notification in Android that you couldn't swipe away. In the recent spate of updates that has changed. I don't like being able to swipe away that notification because I might do it accidentally, and then I can't get it back except by clocking out and clocking back in. (Lollipop user.)

For my needs, this has been the best invoicing app.  It is simple, and doesn't require me to keep my information on the cloud.  I have two problems with the app, and hence 4 instead of 5 stars.  1. I can't figure out how to edit the subject line that is automatically filled in when I email an invoice.  I did it before, but either I have forgotten how, or the most recent update changed something.  Either way, this is a big deal for me.  If someone can write how to edit the subject line for the invoice email, that would be great!  2. When changing to a new mobile phone, I cannot figure out how to get my old information moved to the new phone, and cannot figure out how to get my old settings moved to the new phone.  If there was better documentation in English to really explain how to do everything, this would be a five star app.  As I have to re-enter all my clients and projects into my new phone, and it is hard to figure out how to configure everything, it is a four star app.

Best hours log for construction workers I've found. Takes a little time tweaking the settings to figure it all out, but once you understand how the settings work, it's perfect. You can customize it any way you want as far as pay rates for different scenarios and stuff. I do work for many different companies, and this is the best app for keeping track of who I worked for, and what I was making and when. So good, I actually purchased it, just because it's so well thought out & helpful!

This is by far the best time tracker I have seen. It allows you to input multiple sources (projects,clients etc) and multiple time blocks in a day (4 hrs am, 3 hrs pm.). Also, has an entry for any expenses. You can customize the pay & bonus rates and taxes. Also, has an option to add tags or notes. You can use the punch in/out button or type in. It calculates total hours and total pay for each day, week, month, or at time frame. Paid,open, follow up or invoiced choices for each entry, too! Thx!!

I like the way it keeps track of hours for different projects and/or employers. You can also punch in and out and pause to keep track of time that way. The charts let you compare to a previous week, month or year. It's convenient to be able to email the invoice straight from the app. All around a great app. Was worth paying for the option of unlimited invoices.

Loving this app so much. This app took no time to figure out. It explained exactly what to enter and how to enter it.. Setup was so easy especially compared to other apps. Entering hourly pay, OT pay, the first day of the pay period and pay period. Everything you want to track you can do so here Don't waste time checking out other options. You'll just end up back here. Don't let pretty colors, fun visuals and fancy fonts fool you. They don't make the app easy to use.

I use this to keep track of my hours for my full-time job, plus any side contracts. I don't need it to do anything more than help me remember what to write down on the time sheet. I have found the notes section indispensable for keeping track of tasks accomplished every day. It's easy to update hours worked and how long breaks are. Users can set up contacts with different pay schedules, too. I've used it almost daily for more than 6 months. ETA: Still using it, five years later. Thanks!

this did work fine, but for some reason, it started glinching. when I punch in, it's fine, but when I close out, I have to do it several times, and only one is correct. the others are automatically set for 9 to 5, and they keep going. If I close it out individually, it never ends. it's a loop. I have to go into my app info and do a force stop to get the app to stop and then delete the wrong entries. this needs to be fixed!

Works exactly how I need it for a quick tracker of clock-in times. It takes some time to set up and go through the options to get it how you need it, but once that's done it is good to go and you can just tap the widget on your home screen to record clock in/clock out times. There are options for recording and calculating pay rate, etc, probably useful for someone who runs their own business and tracks their own hours to bill customers. But I don't use that personally.

Overall I like it. It took a bit of playing around to figure out how to use the app efficiently and learn the menu navigation, I still get lost some times. I like how it is simplistic in appearance, no frills, but the add pop ups are at inconvenient locations. The widget tool is really useful. I've used it 1.5 years, I am going to try other apps out but for what I can do with the free version I'd say it's pretty great.

I've tried a couple of different applications over the years, but keep coming back to this one. The main feature that it has that the other ones don't is the ability to create, customized, and send invoices so easily. If you were constantly switching between task or clients, this might not be the best solution for you. However, if you batch your time with clients or have few of them. This is great.

This app is pretty simple to use, the display is nice, and you can also track your miles which is included in with you pay per day. I like the fact that you can mark, or name each shift because as an independent contractor like myself, you don't have to try to remember what you did or where you were on that specific day, or if you have multiple jobs in a day.

Super helpful! I was a little overwhelmed at first but I took the time to investigate what everything was and I love it! I work at a lab and my employer has us log and keep track of our own hours and we turn it in monthly, so I was just looking for a way to keep track of my hours but you can input your hourly wage and it will calculate how much you've earned too! I made it show the dates that will be on my current check(does it for you) and you can change to standard or military time. Recommend!

I use this for my Handyman / Construction job. I use this more than the expensive property management billing apps. I can easily print invoices in PDF format and email them to my clients. It would be nice if they had a paid button to mark invoices paid. Right now I have to enter the amount in for each invoice. Great app overall. Five stars.

I always had a problem to track my time, especially when I was working for multiple projects for multiple customers. This app makes it easy, and well organized my work hours. Using it for a few days only yet, but I love it so far. Wish I had something like this years ago! I would recommend it for self-employed, for small contractors, for handymen, and anyone who working for multiple customers, on multiple projects.

I downloaded the app and filled/saved two days with no much problems. After filling out the 3rd day the inserted time is not saved , but changes automatically into a different time. It is hard to keep track of day to day tasks if the working time is not saved properly. I'd like to use this app, since it is simple with enough options for information, but I can't work with it the way it changes the working time.

(Contractor) This app is great for easily tracking your time for "Time & Materials" projects with push of a button, adding notes for tasks completed (which show up on the invoice for client clarification), and for adding expenses/deductions. The invoices are detailed with the above, look great, and you can even add your logo if you have one (optional). I gave it 4 stars becuz it would be even better if u could attach PDF's of receipts for clients, & expense notes get cut off too short on invoice

Suddenly, the mileage calculator doesn't work and when you hit punch out, it doesn't open the entry. Can this be fixed? I don't know how else to contact you, will be glad to change back to 5 stars when these issues are fixed. [Original] Love it. I have multiple billing lines, and this helps keep my time straight!

Been using this app for not only time tracking of my self employed work, but also as an invoice generator, for about 5 or 6 years now. I used the free version for about 3 years but then went ahead and paid for the full version. It's been a great tool for me. I like the way it generates reports by either project, client, or a specific time period. I recommend. It's not bloated with a bunch of ads either. Love this app.

It is very easy to input data compared to other apps.and output result to analyze data. I love it. However, the reason I give 4 stars, it is not synchronized, I wanted to use this app with phone, tablet or pc at multiple places and multiple employees to input data and share. Then it will be really great tool.

I have used this app for my 2 previous jobs, and I am still using it for my current job. The Free Version of this app is Awesome! I am able to input my work hours from 4 different store locations within my company into this app, as well as my travel mileage from each location to reference for company reimbursement. Best of all, the app calculates your work hours, wages, and mileage based on info entered regarding your pay period/pay schedule and frequency. Customization is Fantastic! Great Job!

I've had trouble keeping up on what hours I've actually worked and how much that amounts to per pay period and this has really simplified that I can go back and add in time punches that I missed, and I can "punch in" and "punch out" and keep a rolling timer for my day on the lock screen, which is awesome for me. Also it's nice that it keeps the entire work shift together instead of splitting at midnight like other apps since I work overnight. Definitely worth trying out!

Works great, been using it for 3 years now. would be great if you could save parts of it to a PDF, such as the daily list of hours and who you worked for. Hard to send anything someone else, like your secretary, because can't be opened on a computer. Otherwise it's the best one I've found.

I've been using this app for 6+ years, and I love it. I use it to keep track of my clients, invoice, track expenses. I have switched phones a few times and am able to transfer the data with ease. I've contacted the developer w questions a couple times and got an immediate response! Recently considered getting an iPhone (peer pressure) but this app is a main reason I didn't - don't know how I'd live without it at this point.

I absolutely love this app, I'm giving it 3 stars because transferring data from one device to another is not easy and time consuming. I've paid to have the full version, unfortunately, I wish there was an easier was to transfer all my account information to a new device, everytime I change a device, I have to reenter my old information. I really wish it was as seamless as logging in using a verification method and picking up from where I left, that said, I only use your app for all my invoices!

The app is good but after a while it locks unless you pay. The unfair part is that once you pay $8.99 to unlock it, it keeps asking you to pay additional $8.99 to unlock other portions which presumably should have been unlocked with the first payment (there is no disclosure). It is like strap. To write the app builder is a waste of time. They do not respond. Now it locks and cannot print invoice. Still no help.

Definitely helps me keep a good track of my hours. Though we use time cards at work, I recommend keeping your own records because I've seen where my records definitely didn't match up to what the company had. My paycheck would be several hours short... I guess if I had one gripe, I suppose it'd be simpler navigation. Icon based GUIs are clean, but sometimes not the most intuitive.

I have been using this app for about a year and it has been great up til now. The only issue I have is now you can't read the hours and overtime worked because the time out runs into the hours worked. This is so annoying. Please fix this issue or explain how to get it back to the way it was. Update: the update fixed the issue with being able to read everything clearly. This is the best time card tracker on Google. I have downloaded many, a couple come close but don't compare.

I can no longer add multiple records at once, I really need this feature. Also this 2018 paid version that I have installed is no longer able to export the invoices. It's showing I have to purchase it again, why? It's working great again. I just can't live without this app to schedule my independent contractor work load and bill my clients.

Looks great with tons of options. As previously mentioned it is difficult finding the upgraded version. There should be an easy link in settings like all apps. The biggest flaw for me is the hefty price for the upgraded version. $46?!? But cant complain much since the free version is very useful as it is. Overall I like it, but because of the ridiculous price I'm still shopping around.

The best app for freelancers like me. So simple, but you can also get as detailed as you want. Keeps track whether you actually "punch" in, or as I prefer, manually, after the job. Can save/print out your own, unique invoices as well. All saved. I so depend on this app. And I have to say, am one that does little reviewing. But can not let this app, not get the credit it is due. Thank-you!!! Also, you can look at either line or bar graphs to see your overall months/years prior. Makes work...fun.

Not only is this a great app, but it's a great FREE app. I've tried a few but this is the best so far. Easy to organize into pay weeks, can have more than one 'client' and make invoices to easily summarize what you're owed. Very easy to edit and add shifts. Recommended for sure! Only thing.. I Wish I could color code the clients. Everything is black and white. Thanks!

This is a wonderful app. It's the best time card app I have found super easy to punch in and out, modifying the time card hours for example you forget to clock out it is super easy to change it. You can set your rate, multiple clients, overtime, invoices are super easy to make, and even miles if you have to drive somewhere. The full version of the app is a little expensive, 10$ but it is totally worth it if you have to keep track of your own hours.

Two things I would change/add to this app. First, there would be a way to keep clients/jobs completely separate. Yes, you can punch in and out for the specifics, but when looking at your weekly/monthly/annual income for each client, you can't. It's all jumbled together with other jobs/clients. Second, there would be a way to back up your records for printing purposes and phone upgrades. Other than those two things, it's a great and simple app!

I love the depth of customization. I travel for work, so keeping track of my pay is a bit of a challenge, with travel time, working, per diem etc, but I can easily keep track of everything, down to the mileage. And I can't recall a single ad, I had to double check, and I only run into banner ads. If I could rate it higher, I would.

I like that it is simple to use in tracking hours, and creating invoices. Since I am only tracking one person, I have not bought the app, and am just using the free version. I think if you're using the paid version, you would have zero issues. Considering my only issue is I can only have 3 invoices at a time, and I can not export the time.

This is a decent app and does most of what I want for job tracking. In fact, I purchased the pro version, but I almost didn't make it that far. I was ready to give up and close this annoying ad-filled, annoying, time-wasting, annoying example of what *not* to do when introducing the public to an app you hope to convince them to buy. Did I mention the ads were annoying? Devs take note - if there were another option that fit my needs, I would have been a lost sale. See my PRO review for more.

Easy to set up. I have only one client and 3 projects, but if I had more it would be a breeze, still. Manual sorting of projects and clients would be neat, but not necessary, naming conventions can do the same. I may not have found it yet, but I would like to add additional info for clients and projects other than what is already provided. Very attractive, easy to setup and use. I will continue using this well thought out app. I now have 3 clients and 5 projects and as I said before, a breeze...

I like this app much better than the previous time card app that I used to use. Features that I wish it had include: 1. After invoicing, I would like the status to automatically change to "invoiced" or when the invoice is paid, to change to "paid". 2. Needs a help feature as I cannot figure out how to schedule overtime. 3. Wish there was a way to get assistance.

Great app for those with multiple cost centers-the ability to easily and accurately differentiate between them has made life better thousandfold! Being able to sort by client or project (and invoice them at the same time with your personal logo) has been most helpful for me. Only thing keeping it from 5 stars is the cost for the pro version.

I have been using this app for several years. I finally figured how to use this app (with no help from you), then you go and change it.I DON'T like this format. I can't record multiple jobs. Records jump all over the calender. When I need to change to a different client I have manually erase the previous record. I hate it. The worst thing is I paid 39.00 for this app. Now I have to look for another app that will help me keep proper records. You totally messed up my bookeeping and collection

first of all I'm 61 years of age so having to learn a new time keeping software was not my idea of a good time but the more I use this and learn what it can do the more I wish I'd started using it years ago. My favorite feature is that if you input all the information correctly the software will produce an invoice that you can immediately provide your client by text or email. what a time saver that is!!!

Not so user friendly! App was acting up so deleted and reinstalled but after doing so then all my previous clocked jobs/times where gone which caused an issue invoicing a few customers. Previously if I forgot to clock in for a job it would let me add it in later and adjust but after reinstalling it, it says saved but when going to the calendar to verify if saved, nothing is there. Referred some people and they dislike as well. Deleteing.

Was an amazing app everything worked as intended BUT ever since this morning i can't "generate" invoices, app keeps telling me to make sure im connected to the internet and then pulls up some old invoice that didnt match any of my selected clients. Client wants to pay and here i am unable to give him an invoice. Not very reliable 👎(EDIT) - Big thanks to Gary, its working. Changing to 5 star just for the quick response and support from Gary!

great app for keeping track of your time and expenses for work. would like to see the ability to print "hours & billable time" same as the invoice, but the raw data. can't seem to make the export function work. still, using it every day and really like it. new clock is a great improvement!

Been testing this app before purchase of pro version. And honestly have to give thanks to developers, can tell was well thought out and designed. This gives me all records and I need to do wide range of work that I do. Gives the options for different pay levels for each job that person has. Nice invoice format, clean, precise, professional! With different options to send invoices directly to customer. Also great feature that can keep complete tracking of paid, non-paid invoices and type payment!

Pretty simple. Gets a little awkward when trying to edit shifts that go thru midnight as it's simple programming seems to treat each shift and day as an island. Otherwise a very simple and straightforward application which is what I was looking for. Just to keep personal records on hours worked and tasks completed for later reference when creating invoices.

Update : All issues have been fixed. I really do use this app all the time. It's great! I love this app. I've used it for years. But now it won't create invoices. I can't email the invoices to my clients because it won't create them to begin with. I've tried all the forms of invoices available on the app. None of them are working.

I am self-employed and this app does an excellent job of keeping track of my time. I like how it lets me pause my time for lunch, break, etc. And assigns a client for each time record. I still invoice from QuickBooks but this works great for me. I just wish I could get rid of the ads.

I work for my self house cleaning. This is the 1st time I have used an app and said WOW. Its efective. Effecient. Not glitzed up with distracting frills. I walk into a job, hit clock in and clock out. I can see who, what, when, and how much. I have yet to use the export or send an actual invoice, but I am very impressed so far.

I was looking for a free invoice generator, and found this one extremely useful. As a sole proprietor, with no employees, this app is user friendly, with all the bare basic necessities to generate a professional looking invoice. I will be upgrading with a one-off donation that provides me with lifetime access, and to be rid of the ads. I highly recommend Timesheet - Work Hours Tracker.

This is a great app for keeping track of all your own hours. iWorks pretty flawlessly. It requires detailed setup, but it's not difficult, and produces perfect results. I have already used it to correct my employer's errors a couple times, and it has saved me about $50, so far. Highly recommended!

Ripped off for $18.99 - Never buy anything from this app or in app purchase. Better free apps available, I was forced to look. I paid for invoice upgrade but it never worked, but they got my money. Contacted the dev and he replied asking me to confirm the problem which I did. That's it, been over a year. Didn't even answer my last email. I found better, higher rates timesheet apps with more features for free. I would like to pay this dev a visit at his office in China to discuss this.

Great app to keep track of schedule, hours worked, break time, mileage, and more! I wish there was a way to put in on-call time that didn't add to total hours worked, but otherwise, no other downfalls. You can take notes if you need to explain mileage or what site you worked that day. Thank you. Would highly recommend!

it calculates hourly charge and will subtract dollar amounts for every minute late or worked overtime but I wish it had space for a daily rate because some jobs are charged for daily service. I restored some information and it deleted everything else and I am trying everything to retrieve them because I am having trouble getting paid. These were not information that I deleted.

This is an update...I'm still using this app 6yrs later. It does what it says and more and once you get your entire profile and invoice formats setup and your pay scales and rates...for the entrepreneurial tradesman like myself, it's perfect. And the invoice generator is a nice touch of course.

I am really enjoying the app for doing invoices and keeping tack of work hours. The time clock punch in option is nice but have the start time option in the event you forgot to punch in is great. It was a little hard to figure out the invoice option took me a little while but once I figured it out everything now runs smoothly.

This app is so easy to use and I've used several other apps to keep track of my time and for somebody that's not as computer savvy as me this is so easy it's unbelievable how easy it is the other ones you know you got to date and then it don't allow you your week to week pay that mine starts on a Wednesday ends on a Tuesday you're able to put that in the system it's a really good at it

Wonderful and simple. It said it was free to use, which it is as long as you don't use invoices, after your first 2 the 3rd one costs. You then have to pay for the app. Which I don't mind doing, it is a very basic, simple, timesheet and very much suggest it to friends and family

Works good... Right up until you want to retrieve your logs then you figure out you can't just email clients the info as shown in the app. It says you can purchase multiple times yet nowhere can I find a place to purchase the app in ether format. Now I'm going to have to write down everything and put it into another app. Smh thanks. Very helpful

Honestly I don't leave reviews for apps often but this one is GOLD. Every freelancer who works for more than one (and certainly more than 3) projects at once should have this app. I tried multiple different timesheet tracker apps before this one and looked no further after. I also basically never spend money on apps but I ended up buying this one to have access to the excel spreadsheet functions and it has totally changed my game. Absolutely worth it! 🔥🔥🔥

I did email the company no response. This product is not easy to use and the setup sucks. The product will not calculate taxes into the pay rate and another issue is transferring the time sheet to the client. I have tried multiple times to share a time sheet with the client and it just a zeroed out time. The worst thing about the product. It doesn't give a preview of of the time sheet before sharing so it's frustrating to get a confused text back from the client. Don't purchase

A Very Good App for working independent. I work on my own hours for my work and this app made it so much easier to keep track of everything, including breaks. it's so easy when you go on break you just hit pause and then go off break and unpause. And then at the end of a project I can create an invoice inside the app that is itemized and totals everything hours and my rate altogether and puts it into a legible form that I can email or print. I love this app!

Takes guesswork out of client charges. Allows EXACT amount of break time deduction for precise payments. Clients respect that I don't charge for sitting on my a$$, eating, and puffing away. That honesty, that this app allows me to provide, down to the second, has earned me a sizable hourly raise in the first month of use. Highly recommend! Easy to use. Ability to program each client, separate pay scales, flat rate jobs, open/closed billing, and totals per week up to annual. Tax time star!

I absolutely love this app! I don't normally write reviews but this app has been so helpful for my home service business I wanted to tell others! I love almost everything except for one thing. Although there is a way of keeping track of miles for each client there is no way of looking up how many total miles you have traveled for you business weekly, monthly or yearly. I am not charging my clients for miles but at the end of the year I would like to know how many miles for tax purposes.

I've used a few timeclock apps before but none came close to this one. There was, for me, a bit of a learning curve in that one MUST click "update" after clocking out for the clock out to register, but otherwise I have nothing but good things to say about it. I went ahead and bought it to use the unlimited invoice feature. This app is well worth the investment, I highly recommend.

Very good app. I use it to clock in and out of my work and send my hours to my boss. It allows me to choose what information I want to record and what I want to send which can differ. Easy to use and understand. I've had no problems with the app. Free export of files would be nice but I realize that money needs to be made by the developers and I do appreciate the free services that are orovided, thank you.

The app is a little complicated and not very intuatively set up, but it's definitely worth 4 stars. Universal design rules should have been implemented in the design face. I would also like to be able to change the thousands separator from a comma to a period, because in Icelandic we write 1.234,56 and not 1,234.56 Other than that, I'm very happy and chose this app over all others after trying toggl track, clockify and Zoho one.
splendid app. Keeps everything up to date. keeps track of schedule, hours, how much you made. calculates weeks, easy to set up. choices of weekly, biweekly, etc , settings. love this app.

love this app to keep track of hours, but recently I can not get it to sync between my tablet and phone. the auto sync does not work. I've tried logging in and out of my Google drive and it won't update on my phone or tablet. so now I manually have to go though and make sure everything is added on both devices.

This has been really helpful and basic. It's not flashy and doesn't need to be. All I need for a free app to help me track my hours with a button. The more advanced features also seem interesting but I haven't looked much into them yet. For now it's just a simple recording of time worked.

Good app for independent contractor or just day labor. Wish there was an option to simultaneously run 2 or more trackers. Would be an awsome feature for someone running small crews and lots of odd jobs. App has a great fre trial, cheap to upgrade functions if you like it for the long haul.

Still absolutely Indispensable! Looking to show total time within a period without clocking/punching out -Am I overlooking or would this be a feature request? Useful, feature rich; no complicated cloud services nor login credentials. Simple to use yet feature packed. Most apps force you to some cloud service or simply do not perform as this app does. And hands down, this app beats them all, even if this were twice the price! Thank you!

I started using the app in October. Paid the once-off fee to use the Invoice Funtion. It clearly states, 'This is not a subscription, but a once-off payment'. About a month went by and I needed to use the app again to generate an invoice and again I needed to pay the 'once-off' fee... please advise.
this app does what it needs to do. I'm only giving it four stars cuz it has a little bit too many features. all I need is to keep track of time. but if you need those extra features, that's a plus.
Really great app. Have been using it to track work hours. Easy to use and update. Lots of options.

I mostly use this app to keep track ofg my daily duties and my employees time's. The app is easy to work with and can be modified to fit my needs. It's a great for self employed ppl like myself. Tks guys
I was looking for something simple, free and easy to use to help me track my working hours. This app fills all the requirements.

Really useful and not to hard to use. I used it for sorting my work hours. The only problem I have is that it doesn't put my days in the correct order but it isn't a big issue and saves having to calculate my hours myself
I paid for this in 2022 now suddenly you want to sell my data??!!! Hard no. Just spent 10 minutes declining dozens of third-party requests for my data. Very disappointing Dev.
Very simple design and easy to use. Use it to log time and contractor details for myself.
this app helps me keep all my work record and my hours simple. I don't even have to count because it does count for me
Timesheet app has always worked flawlessly for me for more than 5 years. It's simple and it works.

This is an update to a previous observation. I service equipment, the app allows me to record all of the info but one item. I need to be able to take a photo of the equipment or the data plate with the serial number. That is the only thing missing. I do not mind paying for it but that would certainly shorten my time

I started using this to track my work hours because our internal billing system got more complicated and it's been super helpful. Requires a little bit of setup, but it's pretty straightforward and works like a charm!

I've only been using Timesheet for a short time but I like it a lot so far. It's simple to use and it has a widget that makes it easy to clock in and out quickly. It would be nice to have some sort of timer that alerts you when you've been working for a specific amount of time but I guess there are other apps for that. Thanks dev team, this is very helpful!
I use Timesheet to track my time on jobs and invoice customers. It’s easy to use, reliable, plus there are no ongoing subscription fees. Highly recommend
Huge thanks to the developers. It has made the tracking of house, workplaces and income very convenient
Nice app. I use it to track my ev car charging costs at the hourly electric rate. Recommended!
i dont like this new enhanced screen. Also the ads on it take up 1/3 of the screen like come on this s is pissing me off
very useful application. easy to use. i really suggest everyone to use this application for record keeping.
Very straight forward and easy to use which makes makes this a very efficient tool. Highly recommended.

Awesome app! I can create flat rate or hourly PER CLIENT! I can insert billable and non-billable lines to keep track of everything! I am a private life assist caregiver with multiple clients. This app is so good. It has clock in / clock out features OR I can add hours manually with notes! Who made this? Definitely an experienced person...No desk jockey, for sure! Great job! Really fabulous! Soooo Useful! A++ Thank you! Oh and it'll back up to my SD card!!! Wow guys!
great app. hope to see more invoice template if possible.
great app ,for keeping track my work hour. keep the good work.
its great, paid, but still got ads
Nice UI, easy to use.

Its fine. I used to keep record of my pay. And when i get paid, to balance the account i use the expense feature. I just enter expense and put it as negative. But now i cant. So my data is like, half of expenses is negative and now every new expenses is like positive value. I tried to install previous version, but cannot use app after importing new version's data. Also, it would be better to include time as well while naming. I lost few data while working to solve the problem.

Great time and expense app. I do property maintenance for different customers and this works for my purposes. My only small criticism is that the Invoice Header is way too big, it takes up 1/4 of the first page. Smaller fonts here would be better. Also notes and tags dont appear on a new line, they are attached to the end of description which isn't obvious. Better invoice formatting overall would make this a 5* app.

I'm torn, I like the simplicity of this app but recurring billing or $109 for lifetime is too high for me. I'd welcome an ad supported version or even a stripped down bare bones level, but less than the $27 that is being asked for. I've found another app that also does what I need. This is my preferred one, but the other doesn't have a steep cost

I loved this app but I kept turning in timesheets that we're a couple dollars off. After much investigation I realized that I wasn't entering anything wrong, the app was calculating my dollar amount incorrectly for the times it was reporting. I never caught it, my client did, and that was really embarrassing. I used this app so I didn't have to set up a whole spreadsheet on my own but if it can't do basic math either I might as well just be making things up. I'm VERY frustrated that I paid money for this when it was screwing up.

I'm going to rewrite my review since you guys were so kind. Overall it's a good app, I like the design and how easy to use it is. Some entry data are useless for me, I just want to track my hours from my 2 jobs & see how much money I'm making. Unfortunately when the trial period is over you cannot keep using the app. Would be nice a free version with limited features.

Well, it used to be a great app. Until after months of use they decided to tell me the free version was now just a trial. Now the app is entirely unusable unless you pay a monthly subscription. Thanks for the lack of clarity that the free version isn't *actually* free. I recommend not even bothering with this app anymore, there are others that are legitimately free and don't try to screw you over after months of use.

I used to use a spreadsheet to keep track of hours which got really cumbersome because I had to make sure I remembered to open and edit the sheet on my computer. Using this app has made that a lot easier as I always have my phone on me and it's super simple to open the app and just press a button! Then it gives me an automatic hour calculation and my estimated earning!

I'm a salaried employee who works WAY over 40+hrs/week... so I've been using this app to help track how many hours it truly takes to do my job. I'm hoping this data will help convince my boss that we need to hire more people! 🤞🏻 The app is easy to use and the Excel spreadsheet reports are super quick/easy and exceptionally helpful! Love this app. 4 stars only because it only allows 30 entries to be stored for free, so you have to delete each entry after you run your report for the month.

Don't let the three star rating deter you. It is actually a decent application and does what most people will want. There are a few kinks that need to be worked out for this to be a long term solution for multiple people. Time tracking and editing on the user level works very well. Templates work great and the extracts are very helpful For the superuser, times should be able to be edited and pay rates added. Changes should be visible to the user would bring to five stars

I've always been quite bad at tracking my hours and expenses. This app has made it so simple and straight forward for me. I can plug in my rent and other expenses to get a real reflection of what money I'll have after everything is said and done. Plus, it's as simple as plugging in my clock in and clock out times with my hourly pay rate. I literally have no guess work or opening up my calculator app to do now. I love this app.

I freelance and may work on a project on and off throughout the day. Because I bill hourly I needed a reliable system to keep track of my time. Once I figured out the pause button was only for premium users and that I needed to tap "clock out" if I was taking a break from a project, everything worked great. I just tap "clock in" when I pick up my work again, and the app will put it all together through Excel if I ask it to.

This app is great for tracking sporatic work hours. It has a good amount of notes and other options. Would be nice if they tacked on a mileage entry. The only thing I don't like is that it continues to ask me to sign in. It does not stop me from making entries when I do not, but tells me I will loose my data.

It has good points and bad. I like tracking of monthly and yearly expenses. I like separating each type of job by tagging. I like the ability to export my year into reports. However, over time of extended use, the program has become the largest app on my phone. It now runs at 500mb. That's after I exported my first year and a half off. If I'd been able to store app data on my SD card it'd be fine. But it's all internal. Speaking of, I wish you could delete multiple entries, not month to month.

So I started a remote admin company mid 2020 & currently have 12clients with varying hours & rates to keep track of. I've used a few Apps now & this is my current favourite (Jan.2022). Super easy to use, not some complicated system I have to learn. Can either clock in & out or just input hours manually. I use different colours for each client which makes invoicing so much easier. & It calculates total earnings per shift. Super handy. Big ups to these guys! Definitely recommend.

Loving the app in the amount of time that I've been using it. Pretty easy way for me to track the hours that I've logged, really love the clock in feature. I kinda wish there were ways to customize the app because everytime I open it I think I opened the calendar app instead. They look very similar, as a matter a fact I believe the dev used the Google calendar app as a template.

This is a great app for recording work hours. I start and stop at different times each day as well and I like the fact that it allows you to amend you start and stop times, but you can't edit these times until you clock out for the day. I would like to be able to amend my start time if I happen to click in after my actual start time instead of having to wait til I click out, otherwise I live this app. Some other time keeper apps I have used offer a trial then you have to buy full version. Thanks

They do their best to hide the price of the subscription required to use this app. It is not on their website and you have to 90% the checkout process to see the price. App seems just ok. There are much better time tracking options. For free and for what they want in a subscription.

My company's time records frequently don't match and adjustments have to be manually entered. Having the Excel report makes it easy to give to my work rather than sitting down the day time ends and verifying everything. Having a record on this app is much easier than keeping track of my time than in a spiral notebook.

Cant set the time periods as needed. None of the preset options work. It calculates pay correctly and let's me add pick ups, copy shifts, etc but it keeps changing the template to preset for some extra partial shifts after I change it to No Template for that entry. Def still needs work, will find another app til then.
Very easy to use and perfect for tracking my daily work hours. I like that I can add notes for each shift. The reports are clear and easy to export for payroll. Exactly what I needed!
This app gives you a great preview of it's function's before purchasing but is a fantastic way to manage hours.

Extremely helpful! I use this app every day. It's brilliant to be able to keep track of your hours and more importantly, overtime. As I work different hours every day, it's good that I can see what my wage is going to be month end. As a truck driver, its also interesting to see the stats and how many miles I've done. The only thing I would suggest is that you could put your mileage in kilometres..as I have to convert it on a separate app to work out, but that's just me being picky.

I use this app daily to log my work hours and have the paid version. While it's very useful, €11 is quite high, especially for basic usage. Offering a lighter version at a lower cost would be ideal. For this reason, I give it 4 stars. I have no issues with the app itself and have been using it for 8 months after thorough research. If more pricing plans are introduced, I'll happily change my rating to 5 stars.

The best timekeeping app I have found among the many options I've tried. Things I like the most are, sync between multiple devices, ability to attach photos, GPS location with map view, can search entries, copy entries to other days, save templates, change color of entries for quick visual id, multiple entries per day, dev responds to questions/suggestions I could go on, but just download it and see for yourself.

Edit: Developers really need to give team members the option to leave a team. I really want to use this app for a new job but cannot get hold of old boss to remove me from team. Otherwise its a great app I have tried a bunch of free apps, gave this one a try. It has been working great for me. still figuring out some of the smaller details. I did purchase a month subscription to pro, and I will probably buy a year.

used this many years ago. great free app for time calculation and accurate record of earnings. it also has an expense option for one of expenses. You are even able to record overtime. it does everything the pro version does the only difference that I can see so far is there is a limited number of entries you can record before you need extra space for entries. by this time you have made a choice to either download pro or just keep using the free version.

Very useful for remembering when my shifts are and calculate how much my pay will be. Good at tracking hours and is quite easy to use. You can only input up to 60 shifts, but that lasts you quite a while and it is very very cheap (around $2) per month if you want to use it more than that. Would recommend!

Love this app. I've been underpaid a few times at work but wouldn't have realised as quickly and easily if I hadn't been using the app. From the information I put in, it tells me how much I should be paid for the month, how many hours I've worked, how much overtime I've done and which days I have worked. I would recommend to anybody. I bought the paid version, which has paid for itself in the long run by making me realise my wages were wrong. Also the tags and colour coding are very helpful.

Since my initial review the update version has limited the number of free reports, this designed to make it unusable for free usage on weekly basis. I looked at the cost to pay and way way too expensive for what you get. May be better if used a level of paid use, £1 a week is all I see it worth for my usage. lone working adjile without going into office this application offers a simple way to keep track of clockings. Then you can export weekly reports in excel to email to office admin.

Good app, easy to use and like that you can change the colour forbid you work more then one job... Something isn't right with your app, the hours and amount of pay aren't the same as what is stated on my pay slips. My pay slips are telling me one thing and then your app is telling me something else and actually have my hours and pay lower then what I actually see on my pay slips... Sorry but not paying for premium just because my quota is full, what a load of bs. Not impressed at all

Great app, there's only one thing that it's missing, the ability to add notes to a day's shift. In my organisation I have to report what hours I've completed on a particular job number, if the app had a notes section I could do this. Currently I add a tag for each job number then record the hours separately then add them to the export spreadsheet manually.
simple, practical free and no ads yet.

I'm not happy that I now have to pay a subscription fee. I'm uninstalling and using a different App. I work various locations on different days of the week. It's a great tool for keeping track of my worked hours and potential pay for the week, including bonuses, allowances, penalty rates, etc. It's really handy.
I like this app. Easy to use, keeps me organized. I only use it to keep track of my hours worked. Dose much more as well.

I've been using this app for a couple weeks now because i noticed my payroll at work has been incorrect. So far, i've had to correct them at every pay period because I now know exactly how much i should be making and the hours i've been working. I highly recommend at least trying it out. The full version looks worth it too. I have the free one at the moment and I will be upgrading. Awesome app! I'm loving it so far :)

Useful for noting various time related events throughout the week and month. I've recommended this app to other people with similar life/work structures to myself. The export tool used with an external editor is really good. There's definitely a lot of potential for further development of the software application.

Almost Perfect....Just one thing missing...The Pay Period. It should have a feature which shows how much you are going to get paid on the next paycheck. Please add this feature if possible ...It is really difficult to set the custom range to check your earnings because it is hard to keep track of if you are paid biweekly (Not 1-15)(Monday to Sunday)... Thanks....

I use this app to log various jobs using different templates for different clients. Using tags with templates I can easily see how much I have earned for each client which helps with my billing. Having the pro version means I always have a backup. Very useful when my phone died recently. I couldn't work without this and still be on top of my job logging and billing.

Pretty good. I'm in Australia so your winter theme is annoying - it's 35°C here. No way to remove or change background, or advise what hemisphere you're in. Also needs a "break" button that records break time rather than just the pause. Uninstalling but pretty close to what I want other than this two things. A widget would be even better. Cheers.

I am pretty much impressed by this app. Hats off to the creators. I use different tags for different projects I work everyday and it's so fast and easy to add entries. It would be more handy if there is some kind of tool to calculate the total hours worked on each tag, after the entries are sorted according to the tags. Please consider this in the future updates.

I really like this app, but after several months of using it I made the mistake of signing in to remove the annoying message. Now I have to wait ages for it to download the data and populate the app. But the amount of time it takes to load is too long and now I have to find another app. I don't want all this cloud save BS, just wish this kept a local copy of the data on your device that I could access without a data signal.

Easy to keep track of how long I've worked each day as I clock on and off frequently. The app could be improved with the ability to total the hours worked each day/week. Edit** 9 months of frequent use, still going strong! Found the week totals in settings. Could still be improved with daily totals, and clock in/out from the lock screen. Thanks! 2nd Edit** 2.5 years of frequent use, still happy with this app!

Decent App. Wish the free version had an option to save timesheets in a different format. An option to select a typical Monday through Friday work week, instead of having to change it each time a report is created, would be nice too. A little more "USER" friendly would be nice. But, decent enough for a free App.

Very good app. Easy to use. Nice UI. My only complaint is, the lifetime price seems a bit, well... pricey. Unfortunately, I do not need this app bad enough for me to pay in it forever and ever but, I do not want to pay $100 all in one go so.... I will not be using it any longer. However, that is me and my own personal needs. Others may need/want it had enough. I highly recommend anyone to atleast try the app and decide for themselves.

This makes an invoice /bill look so professional and is so easy to use. I'm just waiting to hear back on if/ how to show over-time hours (because couldn't figure it out), then will purchase. If overtime was not so important, would have already bought the app bec really tremendous!

a simple time-tracker that is easy to use and does what I need. it has a clock-in/out timer feature that is nice, but i primarily add my time manually after i work. it allows me to have tags for my multiple jobs. it adds up my hours for the month, so i can see my running total. it allows me to type notes, so that o document what i did during my work time. my only wish is that it had a calendar view.

I loved this app and have used it for years to record my hours and recommend it to my coworkers for years but now all of a sudden they turned my app into a trial app and demanding I pay for it after years of free use only saving hours to my phone and not their systems. I sadly have to remove this app now and move on to another app to record my hours. I can not give a good rating to such actions especially since performance has gotten slow in last couple months.
absolutely love it. Simple to use and love reminders to sign in my days hours. Totally recommend.
I use the free version and find it excellent for recording my hours for work.

I would have given five stars but needs more templates for day rate and more control over pay and overtime rates but other than that it's a great app keeps track of time as long as you remember to punch in and out on the app and also more editing your easier editing features to adjust time punching and out

Been using the app about a week now and overall it seems to be good. Im a contractor and have different pay rates depending on the job. I wish there was a way to have several rates ormaybe I havent figuered it out or paid to get that... either way a fine app. I use the tags and add events on the days needed.... I will try useing seperate templates. So far I havent found any issues that I couldnt solve in the app. Maybe the issues in computing time are the user and not the app. 🤯

Excellent app, easy to use and track hours and pay. I would like a better calendar view though, with the ability to and a note/title to each day as I need to track days worked from home and days worked in office. As well as be able to see pay days or pay periods on the calendar

Been using this app for couple of months now, just for my personal use, to help me keep my work hours and calculate my pay. All of the sudden, the app now is saying that I can't not add work hours, unless I subscribe and pay a monthly fee. I thought this was a FREE app. Very disappointing.

I absolutely love this app, I use it for work. We don't have a clock in/out machine so we have to keep up with our own hrs for the week and this app is a life saver lol It took me a little bit of time to get the hang of clocking in and out but even if you forget as long as you clock in and out at some point that day you can go in and edit to fix your time. I definitely recommend this app if you have a job like mine.

Best app ever for a freelancer! I'm a payroll consultant and also work a bunch of side gigs. This app really helps me stay on track with my bookings and also shows me my income as I go. The best part is the excel spreadsheet that I can run for any time period. I definitely recommend this if you don't have a traditional 9-5 like me. 🙂

Great App. It allows me to track time and pay for different categories, exports the info on excel. Wish it would allow for more days. Once I export it, I delete the info on the app, which gives me the ability to keep using it for free. For that I'm grateful.

I'm just updating the app, I hope I can add overtime after 40 hrs with continued to click in and out. I don't like that it puts clock out hrs before the end of shift. sometimes he works 8, 10, 12 or even 14 hrs a day. we use this as a personal app to keep his hrs. we are enjoying it, just a couple of minor things I'd like changed. good app!

I liked the app, how it's set up and how it displayed the data. I just don't like that I have to pay to use the basic functionality of the app. I don't want any of the extra junk like syncing or anything, just wanted to be able to use it to record time entries for myself. Can't make any new entries now that the trial has ended.

Very good one...best in playstore. Please try to add day( sun,mon...) when generating excel sheet. Only date is provided... Weekends have different pay , it will be easier if you could include the day also... Also statistics chart needs to be simplified...n improvement is required there ... Waiting to give 5star after those updates. Apart from that ... good work guys... keep going.

Works as advertised. Simple formatting so you dont have to be a genius to figure it out. You can preset 2 time templates and they offer a filing system woth color codes so you can easily review where you were and what you were doing. It also tracks time and income stats for you. It starts out as a review tool but helps to plan better for future jobs and assignments to maximize your productivity and profitability!

Here lately the app has been freezing up a lot when I first downloaded the app it worked excellent no complaints but in the past two to three weeks it freezes up constantly. UPDATE 2/18/2022>>>The above problem was addressed on February 3rd 2022 it was fixed and did not lose any of my information and if there was 10 Stars I would have give it a 10 star rating for the customer service. I will not use any other time tracking app I highly recommend this app PERIOD!!!!

I wish they could introduce more options like days off without showing the time and I wish they could add an option of calculating the earnings based on the user like I don't want to see the monthly total I'd like to see like from pay date to pay date and all these little gimmicks. Also a dark mode would be nice but other than that very useful app. Well done

I've been using this app for a year and I think it is fabulous. I work three jobs with variable hours and it is the best and easiest way to track my hours and earnings. As a contract worker, I used to love how easily you could scroll through all yearly, monthly, and weekly earnings. The new system only allows for easy viewing of this month/week and the previous. Otherwise you have to type in a start and end date, which is tedious. The previous system was 5 stars for me.

My Free Lifesaver ❤️❤️❤️ this app is super easy to navigate, free, lives up to expectations, makes my life 1000x's easier, convenient, and i like how i can color coordinate. It lets me put in hour, expense, and time. Just this app does everything i need to even the math for my pay, and my hours.

This is great. Worth $50/year. Will be giving feedback as I go for any improvements. Job well done. Day 1 updated review: 09/01/24 So far, this app is accurate and amazing. My job is having issues with new system and I have to keep track of hours worked, OT, Differential pay and more. I would recommend adding a feature that allows you to total up the weeks in a pay period and then put in deductions at the end, giving the ability to see what your next paycheck will look like.

The app does what it says, and it's the only app I've found that does what I need it to do. I decided to pay for the premium subscription, however it only changes your quote from 60 to unlimited. There is nothing else you can do with premium, not even customizing the color of the app.

Great but some features could be made more simple, for a quick and easy to acess. Wish there was an option to set your hourly rate and penalty rate, so I don't have to insert every time since my starting time is always different although templates is great only if you start and finish the same everyday.

not bad, few improvements would be to have the templates recognise o/t after specified hours worked and specified days of the week. Because it's a hassle putting it in for the odd hour I work it, especially when I need to insert bonus multiple times because it doesn't register it the first time Also, no destinction between time&a-half and double-time

Great app. The only thing I would change would be making the viewing better (cleaner) and the usability simpler. Especially for the statistics, that needs to be a little easier to use for looking up daily, weekly, and monthly hours/pay so we can see how everyrhing adds up. And the daily clock-in page would be easier to view with a cleaner, more contrasted, simpler look. But overall, great app

This app has been really great for me. I work very odd hours and can go in at different times and also get off at very different times. This app allows me with just a few clicks to alter my daily time to reflect this. And I'm also able to have tags programmed in that can help jog my memory and remind me what I was working on a certain day if my bosses question why I had a particular amount of hours on a certain day. All in all i feel like this app is worth your time.

Great design, very appealing, easy to add similar or recurring shifts and great solution for managing timesheets for two or more people. I would love to use this app but without calendar view I don't find it worth the price, unfortunately subscription is required to backup the data which is very important to me. Uninstalled for now.

***UPDATE***This WAS a great app. I've been using it since January 2020, and it WAS awesome. I even had to do a factory reset on my phone (right at the end of the pay period), and when this app reinstalled all my times were still there! However, the free version is now telling me my "trial is over." Would have been nice to know this date ahead of time so I could have planned.

Really liking this app until I logged in and found out I can only have 60 entries before I have to pay $1.50 a month. Logged out, and all my data was gone. Looks like, as long as you don't log in there is no limit, but your data isn't safe either. Too bad, I really liked the look and feel of the app.

I enjoy using this app and the different features that are available. The only drawback I have encountered comes from working over night shifts. I start one day and then end the next. It took a little bit of time to determine how to separate each week's hours accordingly. Fun to use and helps me keep track of hours in case there is a work technical issue.

Amazing simple app. You can keep track of hours lunches and breaks. You enter how much you get paid a hour and it tells you how much money you would have made by pay week. You can edit your time to. I only wish it had a way for you to enter and track mileage to.

I been using this app for years and at first this app was the best and easiest time tracker to use plus it was free. Kept track the hrs I work each month it was the best. I got laid off over the winter and just got to work and found out that now this app wants u to pay to use it sorry I guess I'm looking into another app that offers free to use and mean it i have paid to upgrade but I never gotten a chance to.

Love this app. my job was having some system errors and it is just a safe thing to double check. It has some amazing features like setting my "standard" clock in and clocking out times and rate per hour so it is really simple and a couple clicks and it is double checked. This app gives me such a peace of mind with my memory loss that I am calculating my pay checks right so i can budget more efficiently it is easy to make changes if you clocked out later, earlier, etc. Thank you for this app!

Love this app however I feel that you should be able to allow you to enter multiple payments as I am in two different salaries for my company for two different things. Also calendar integration would be awesome so that way you can go into your calendar and then look back at the days you worked and plan out your schedule through your calendar app

Very good app for tracking your hours and seeing how much you're being paid in real time. One thing I'd improve on though would be the ability to clock on in the past in case you forget and still be able to see your earnings in real time.

I've been looking for an app that can track my time and give me a total with my pay, and this is the best one. Thank you 😊 Buy is not free.😒 In the month of March 2023, the calendar is not correct it has Sat. and Sun the same day the 11, and it's counting double. Please fix.

I would love for there to be more editing options, which I hope is being worked on, but overall I really like the layout. I use Gmail and it has a similar feel which I enjoy, but I would love to be able to make more comments not just tags and if there is a way to pre-set it so that anything over a certain amount of hours begins to count as overtime that would be really helpful. I hope you keep working on this app, I think it is a good base for what is offered, but there is a need for improvement

Exactly just what I need! Very easy to use and convenient interface. Would be better if we can adjust the payment time scale (e.g. not just on hourly basis), because mine is per 40 mins actually. I wish there's a lifetime premium option (or maybe there is?)

Once you figure out how everything works and the different templates you can set up it's an amazing tool for keeping track of hours. I use mine to keep track each week to make sure payroll has my hours right instead of trying to remember day to day.

Its ok, its a simple thing to use, however there is no way you can administrate the monthly and year plan. It shows I paid for it, however I never got an email confirmation. I was also not able to back up the info when I login through another phone. Wouldn't really recommend it.

Fantastic app! We use it for our small crew of 4. It is super easyto use and to drop everyone's spreadsheets into my main payroll sheet. My only issue and literally the only thing keeping me from buying premium is that it would be nice to connect my employees' accounts to mine. That way, I don't have to remind everyone to send me their timesheets on Friday.

Really like what I see but I'd like to see an overview option where I can see the whole calendar with my work days marked in, even a week view would be nice similar to normal calendar apps. That would make it easier to visualize and understand when planning! Push notifications and reminders would be great as well. Thank you and I love this app so far

Started a new job . This app allows me to change my break time and gives me a great overlook for my hours and pay . You can clock in or just add the day and edit it afterwards pr in-between if nessersary. Absolut love the app. Easy to input data and you don't have to be a phone expert to handle it .

It's missing some options, I need the ability to input my daily hours as I work each day, not a template. And I get overtime pay during certain hours worked even if I don't have 40 hours yet. No option for this. UPDATE, thank you for your response and information about the app.

This timesheet is the most practical and simple to use Timesheet ever. I've tried a few different ones from other apps and found them hella complicated. I'd recommend this Timesheet to anyone who needs help keeping track of work hours and salary expectations. Plus its visually appealing with your fav colours.

Been using app for a while however now all of a sudden it tells me to update my payment method with payment overdue. Tried multiple cards and it won't accept payment no matter what I do. This is frustrating and don't want to lose my tracked hours but I may have to find another app!

The app is great BUT I don't see REPEAT , SHARE options. It's is very time consuming to enter all data manually. Add this options and I will buy it. The other great option that I love is that the app works offline as well. There are places without wifi reception and still the app can be used.Greetings.

Rip off! I have used the qpp for 2 years without any issues. So every time I opened the app I was being prompted to sign in or create an account. The moment I signed in I have to subscribe and pay or I can no longer use the app.

I love this app! I upgraded to pro to get more entries and its worth the $1.49. it's really helpful for me because my work schedule is inconsistent. the feature that puts this above any other time tracker app I've tried is the bonuses! I work as a host so I get tip share in addition to my hourly wage, so I can add whatever tips I get as a one time bonus and its added to my wages for that shift. it also tells me what my hourly wage rounds out to. in general, it's pretty basic, but very useful!

before timesheet i tried many other apps to monitor my working hours but none did what i wanted or made it too confusing. but tgen i foubd timesheet and it was exactly what I wanted!!! easy to use templates to make life much quicker. tge realy bonus for me was to be able to set extra pay for my night rate on top of my day rate separately (i start my shift before night rate kicks in). the summary screen gives me a clear guide of what to expect at the end of the month too!

Great app. Have been using it for a long time. Now all of a sudden my subscription is cancelled because no matter what payment method I use, it's declined. Even if I use my Google play account which has enough to cover the cost in it. I paid $1.57 for this app for years. NOT worth what they are charging now.

I have downloaded alot of different apps like this one but none of them compare. This app is easy to use, very convenient and customer support is truly amazing and actually care about your experience with them. I don't pay for apps or upgrades but this app deserves it. Yes, I upgraded 😸 and will continue to do so. Thank you so much for developing this app!

It's cool but I would like if it kept the amount I got paid per hour. Instead I have to put it in each time. I also would prefer if it had an option to add up how much my gross pay is every week or two. Otherwise it's is simple to use.

really good for just keeping track of general hours/how much i'll be making per shift ballpark. love the options to consider breaks. LOVE that i can add tags incase i have to note something about a shift. + The fact that it keeps tracks of monthly hours and earning is awesome. :)

Very misleading app, forces you to buy a subscription after 30 days to keep using it. At least give us a free version with less features? Now im not even interested in upgrading because that's not a good business practice There are many free alternatives out there, or just use a spreadsheet.

I'm finding this app to be extremely useful in the simple tracking I need related to an elderly parent's caregiver's time. There are far more features beyond my needs that are provided & will certainly be helpful/versatile for others relying on more in-depth data tracking, but this is serving my own needs beautifully in a very straight-forward, easily notable manner. I'm so grateful to have found it! Other time-tracking apps I looked into were much more convoluted & cumbersome by comparison.

I only just downloaded it today and used it but so far so Good. It was very easy to set up and just is easy to operate. It shelf filled in my clock out our configured to 8 hours. And also advised me of a shortcut As I went to many screens advanced in order to complete a task. Had more features that I would enjoy using In which I didn't configure that would make my day and finances a lot easier

I really like this app. It's very easy to use. I love that I can run reports for a specific date range and filter by different labels if I want to. The only suggestion I would make would be to make it so that time spent could come up as a decimal number in the Excel reports rather than a number of hours and minutes.

playStoreReviews.text: This is one of the best Apps Ever out of ALL of them. absolutely perfect, the UI is clean and simple, the map is clean and simple, the way the icons work is perfect, the navigation is easy, there are NO ADS, NOTHING! and ALL the stats and logs are free!! AND THE GRAPHS, there is NO PAYWALL for graph progression and it is simple and intuitive!!!! I've been using this for over 4 years now!! PERFECT APP!! Thanks to EVERYONE who made this!!

This is just what I needed for tracking my workouts and progress. It's super customizable without being too overly complicated. I also really appreciate that the developer offers the premium version for a very reasonable one time payment instead of an insane fee or a subscription, and I appreciate that the app doesn't collect any of my data.

super straight forward, no fluff. Allows you to input the exercises youre doing with weight and reps. They have a comprehensive list of exercises per muscle group/split to choose from. If you dont see the one youre looking for, you can add a new one. Also allows you to copy workout from the previous week and reuse them for a consistent routine/split. Would recommend, love it so far.

This app is perfect. Coming up close to a year of usage and still have no intention of switching. The app does everything you would realistically need and was surprisingly intuitive to use without need for a tutorial. The only feature I would like to see is a way to sub-group swappable workouts ("OR" operator). On days when the gym is packed, this could make it a bit easier to visually "swap" out exercises, rather than clutter in all the primary and alternative exercises onto the same day.

I am in love with this app! I have been searching for a free gym tracking app for my weight lifting, and it's this one!! Thank you!!! I love watching my personal records (weights or reps) each time I work out. it's a great way to see the non-scale victories when the scale is barely moving.

Been using this for years at this point. This is the perfect tracking app. No ads, no unnecessary features, lightweight, simple UI, able to add your own workouts, able to visual your growth. Stop wasting your time looking for a perfect fitness app and just get this one. Who cares about fancy features that you'll never use and cost monthly to use.

I've been using this amazing app for several years now, not once have I seen an ad, been asked to buy anything, etc. Just an amazing dev who gave the world the best workout log app for nothing in return. This app blows everything else out of the water, even the paid workout log apps don't compare to the simplicity and quality this app offers, it's strictly to the point, no bloat. just log your reps, weight and that's it. It has charts to see your volume over time and many other stats. Best!

This is everything I wanted, no annoying ads or pop of videos. The app is simply to use and very well thought of! If a workout is not there, you can easily add it or even create a category for it without any issues. I just started working out, and this only helped me stay consistent with my goals. I love how simple it is and how it keeps track of my growth If you are looking for a simple fitnote app, definitely recommend this app!♡ I

It took some doing to figure out, but now it seems super simple. You can add new excercises if they arent in the list. You can specify how you want to track them beyond weight and reps, they have time and distance. Then in calendar mode they have colored dots to see which muscle groups you did and a chart to see which groups you gave the most attention. On the surface I thought I was just adding weight and reps, but after finding the home button I realized it is really thoughtfully designed.

FitNotes is the only workout app you’ll ever need. I’ve been using it for years, and it delivers exactly what matters—no gimmicks, no distractions. It’s a straightforward, no-nonsense app that gives you everything you need to train hard and track your progress. I work out to get stronger, not to play with flashy features. FitNotes keeps it simple, efficient, and focused—just like real training should be.

I've had this app a while and with the latest update it is everything I could possibly need. Super easy to log daily routines. Easily check your previous workout's numbers while logging your new one. View graphs and stats for those workouts along with calculated max weight values for various rep counts. Highly recommend for anyone interested in tracking your numbers to maximize results. Update, 2026: Still my go-to for logging workouts, paid the few bucks to support an awesome app 💪

The best fitness tracker app I've found - everything is free with no ads ever including viewing graphs of progress and calculating the plates for your weight. You can add custom exercises/machines, change the details on each exercise, all sorts of customization. UI can be a little tricky to navigate but worth it for the app being fully free

I love this app. I've been using it for 2 years. My personal trainer was impressed by the app and asked about it. You can track your workouts and your progress. It's easy to view your history for any exercise. Adding an exercise to your database is simple. I particularly like the ability to copy a previous workout to a future date.

It's for logging your workouts. it doesn't try to to integrate with all your devices and apps. it doesn't track your heart rate or blood pressure. it doesn't coach you or make exercise recommendations. Because it doesn't do those things, it is super efficient at planning a workout and recording your weights and reps. Exactly what I was looking for.

Great app. been using it for almost 2 years. I can customize my workout each day and it remembers the last weight and reps I used. I do wish there was a way to create custom groups of workouts for example: leg day, core day, arm day etc and quickly go to a list of those groups and pick one. There is supersets but I find it hard to find and utilize. You can go to your calendar and copy a workout but you don't know what grouping it is until you click in and look.

I've been using this simple-to-use app for 2 years now and it's reliable, flexible and gives lots of advanced features. You can set goals, see all sorts of stats (reps, max weight, etc) and add new custom exercises. It keeps me motivated because I can review my progress with the touch of a button. Edit: it's probably been 8 years and I'm still using this app. Reliable and only what you need.

Writing a new review - this app continues to be the absolute best workout log on Google Play. That said, there are a few features still needed: on unweighted exercises, it doesn't recognize PRs, and when calculating volume or number of sets, there's no way to tell it not to count warm-up sets. Additionally, you can't put an exercise into multiple categories (for instance, bench press should be volume towards both chest and triceps, but you need to choose one or the other.)

Very cool, you can input your very own exercise stuff so it doesn't limit you on what you can put in! 😄 I only wish I could add pictures or something to visualize each type of exercise like other apps do, otherwise I'm stuck naming stuff like "kneel on floor face down side lift leg", which gets annoying to figure out the more complicated the exercise is.
