playStoreReviews.text: Love it for the most part! Very easy to use, but with a few upgrades it could be the best app out there imo. It'd be much better if bank transactions and receipts would merge automatically. Also, going through drives one by one is terribly slow. It would be much better if I could scroll through a list and bulk select or even swipe left or right to classify as business or personal.

It needs dark mode. For personal use it needs a way to track debts and savings and bank transactions without having to link a bank account, and auto itemizing might be nice... To everyone confused about the ad to upgrade to the paid feature, just tap your back button on the phone. if you're out of the 10 free auto scans per month, just tap the back button built onto your phone (there's no x button) and add your receipts manually. For me, the free version works fine with a small learning curve.

It's OK & fairly simple which is what I wanted but it needs more flexibility & some functions don't appear to work. I want to add my mileage manually for medical travel but would like to be able to add the 2026 IRS reimbursement rate and have it calculated for me and print reports. I don't see the entry I entered at all. Choosing manual entries for Drives should clear the prompt to have it track. Also designating multiple purchases on a receipt to different categories needs to work better.

It was absolutely fantastic for about a month. Easy way for me to store my receipts and track my milage to and from work. But today as I was inputting all my receipts and miles from this past week, it did the annoying thing asking me to subscribe to the app. I don't need all the cool and extra features so I dont get it. But I cant add anymore expenses of miles in until I pay for a subscription. For a "FREE" app, it got pretty expensive pretty quick.

I find it very easy to use, the smart capture option js really accurate, but I have just one complaint. When using the website, it gives you the option to import a CSV file and bulk import expenses. However, that feature doesn't work, so I spent all this time formatting everything correctly so it would go through and it still did not work. That's the only thing keeping it from being a 5-Star product.

I like how it detects and scans a receipt just showing it to the camera, and crops automatically, but it sometimes mistakes the tax for the total and might mistake the month for the day of the week. So you really need to verify every receipt before you save, which to me. I couldn't find a way to add tags and categories, which to me is a must in order to sort expenses into groups for reports. I experienced the few bugs using my new Samsung s23. monthly subscription is $7. App needs improvement.

First few scans look amazing. The OCR is exactly what I was after. Not only was the app 90% accurate (save for a few misidentified numbers that could easily be rectified) but it nearly always identified the type of vendor, the receipt type, and the purchase date. It's also amazing that it can export to an itemized report for easy use in other tools. Five stars!

Had to scan each receipt several times. It looks like it would be a good app if it were cleaned up a bit or if I only needed to scan one or two receipts. I have dozens for every job I do. Randomly picked spots on the receipt to focus on, so I had to reset the field of view for every receipt. At the end of the day, it was quicker, and as time is money, cheaper to just go buy a dedicated receipt scanner with an OCR package than to spend the time to use the free app.

It offers many features but half of them don't work. For instance, they lure you into sharing bank info by claiming you can receive $50 credit on their card. However, none of the card related areas of the app ever load. I can't add funds, issue card, or anything. Look elsewhere for an expense app. This one is gimmicky at best and malicious at worst.

after MUCH research and trial of different products, we settled on this app. not only is the interface very user-friendly and easy to use, but the camera scanning and upload is simply SO very fasy and accurate! some of the other options which we thought might be a better fit actually struggled to upload, (sometimes 20+ seconds!) and the AI did not pick up any details consistently from reciepts! Easy Expense is not cheap, but when you factor how FAST and actually easy to use and to set-up, wow!

I just installed the "free App" but it is only free trial for a week. It made me give a cc number and then wants to charge me $47.99 (which is 50% off their regular price) after the week trial. I did get any option for a free version. I don't mind paying if the app is worth it but I don't want to have to pay double the amount next year and who knows what it will cost after that. The app seems to work good the few receipts I have scanned.

So far I really like the app. I've used it for a year when I started using it to track mileage. I like that I can go in later and add travel dates that I didn't get to do on the day I traveled. I'm recently trying the receipt scanner which works very nicely overall though sometimes I have to correct information but that is easy to do. I'm hoping it's easy to see all possible deductions in one place versus non deductions but I've not found that yet.

I downloaded several receipt scanners and this one is by far the easiest to use. Others I had to manually enter many fields and this does most of the work for me. A bonus is it's fun to look at! I love that I can easily split a reciept into different categories, look at specific stores or specific categories. This is exactly what I was looking for. Now if this app could talk to my favorite budget app I would be in Heaven.

This is a pretty good app. I do have to update the amount of money or change the way I would prefer to categorize it. That isn't a problem for me since I've already been managing my finances and know how to do so. I've only used it for personal expenses so I can't speak to the other part. It suddenly asked about subscribing, which I thought was strange. Honestly, had I known, I might have chosen another app since it will not connect with my bank or with other tracking apps on my device.

Overall a useful app - I travel frequently for business, and find this to be a huge timesaver when it comes to keeping track of expenses. I haven't used many similar apps, but my company likes the report format, so I have stayed with this for several months now. The only possible complaint is regarding Smart Capture - it doesn't work all that well with larger receipts. This may be a function of the phone it is ised on more than the app, though.

This app is super helpful for small businesses to keep track of expenses. If they come out with an app that also will track income receipts, that would be huge! It's hard enough to keep up with the books, but this app definitely helps. Sometimes the camera has issues focusing or picking up the right info so it is not perfect, but still worth it for a pay as you want app

This app does not capture the correct date on the receipt most of the time. It also doesn't show you the total before tax is added. There is not enough space to save data and when you export the information 98% of does not go to Excel. I spent three hours adding expenses only to have 98% of lost. For $49.00 it should do more, I want my money back or am doing a bank chargeback.

Amazing app. Helps me do what I need to keep my business going. Save your pictures to your phone before your attach them. For whatever reason the take a picture direct doesn't work so well. Still an amazing program. Accounting programs were over $100 a month, so I went ahead and bought the upgraded version of this program for $100 a year. Seemed like a no brainer.

This is a train wreck. The interface is a mess. It never reads the date correctly, and it often reads the transaction amount incorrectly, so you need to manually edit every scan. A subscription for software like this is a hard sell in the first place. Then to ask for a subscription for something that doesn't work is absurd. Then to ask $70 for a subscription is insane.

It's an excellent app service that helps me to track all of my receipt records without me manually doing it. I just scan the receipts, it copies it, then it records the dates, the overall purchase amount , and it identifies the transaction as gas, food, or others.. It has many other features which I haven't tapped into as of yet, but for now, I enjoy what it does for my business book keeping.

Great app, but pop ups for donations though can be.... a deterrent. It made me want to switch but couldn't find better alternatives, so came back. Does a great job in keeping records of receipts and adding labels. Helps me to track how much I spend in a month. Does not have a daily spending tracker, but I can survive without. Overall I recommend.

Giving it a try. I have been looking for a scanner for receipts but haven't found one I liked yet. This one is doing well so far after a few hours use. It is free but after a few scans they ask for some money. You can make it $0. If I like it and keep using it I will consider paying. It does usually get the date and amount correct but always double check. It also starts to recognize receipts and fills in the merchant.

It is pretty good overall. It always seems to get the total of a receipt correct, but sometimes I have to enter tax manually (which is mainly what I started using it to track). It seems to have difficulty with tax when it's labeled as food tax due to a different rate or with digital receipts, possibly due to it not being next to the total.

No ads & accurate scanning detection of my personal receipts. Many banks will not allow you to add additional (bank) accounts. Receipt Scanner allows that, which is why they are valuable in keeping my spending organized. They only ask for a donation or a very reasonable fee. I'm very happy with this app and recommend.

Very simple and straight forward. I don't usually don't take the time to review an app, but I figured since I didn't have any bread to offer the developers the least I could do was give an honest review. I have tried many different types of expense apps for my company. This one is hands down the best. Its got the features I need and use to track my expenses for my personal and business accounts. It recognized the receipt and all its information almost flawlessly. Good work! Nice app!

So far, it's the best. I just started using the app and I've tried at least 8 or 9 other apps . This was the only one the had a reasonable accurate scan for dollars and vendor. It allows for notes on each transaction and to assign each to a report. I've set up a report for each category I want to track. Most other apps limits the scans and takes a long time to scan. This app is also multi platforms with web app and am apple version. I will definitely buy a subscription if it continues to impress

I've been wanting a good receipt recording app for a while, but this is not The One unfortunately 🙁 .. when I first started it the camera image was upside down (excuse me???) and out of focus with NO focus control .. the developers give themselves too much credit on being able to completely automate image capture--just call the built-in camera app, F*S .. Wound up taking a (right side up and in focus) picture and the OCR did appear to be quite accurate .. capturing the total (sigh) ..

App forces you to add a bank account (my mistake. Only does that if you apply for a credit card, which I did) Have only added one receipt, but did an ok job of reading the receipt (missed the prominent business name) but got the rest right. Again, only been able to do one. I ran into a snag (totally my fault) and a rep contacted me immediately and helped me resolve the issue. So 5* for customer service. Will update review as I get deeper into the app.

This is the difinitive expense tracking app! Not only can you link your bank account to automatically catch expenses, but you can scan receipts to organize and itemize as well. This clean and easy to use platform helps even the most disorganized individuals (myself), see an island oasis amid the sea of paperwork! Worth every cent and more! Dare I say, INVALUABLE! kudos to the developer(s)!

Update: it still works fine, but it is a little slow. Somtimes I jsuy have to wait a while after a scan and then still adjust the parameters. So far so good. I have scanned around 20 receipts and I haven't had any issues yet. The scan doesn't take very long and I only have to edit the store names usually. I'd recommend it.

This app is great! It isgood at recording the receipts accurately. I am trying to make sure I keep track of a personal project I am working on. Me and my bf are both buying things and we are easily able to categorize it under who made the purchase. We can also easily see the reports to track who has spent what and we are able to move the data to a Google sheets doc quickly. (My favorite feature!) It saves a ton of time and a ton of headache because we can just log each purchase immediately.

My partner refuses to let me use this app. The report was 18MB and cannot be sized down. So emailing is not possible for some. So it's a good app, but you lost a star because we can't compress. Phenomenal app. It did EVERYTHING I dreamt it would so quickly and easily I'm astonished. It scans receipts and does all the math itself to produce totals for clients and if a receipt isn't clear, you can enter it manually, yet still include an image. Absolutely brilliant!

When scanning a receipt, it rarely gets the information correct. Sometimes, it lucks up and gets the price, but most of the time, I have to manually enter the vendor and price total. Also, it does not recognize a handwritten gratuity total. I give it 3 stars since it's a good concept that needs updates. Also, it would be great if a one-time purchase could be done instead of a monthly fee.

I've only been using it for a week or two, but so far so good. I can easily scan or manually enter transactions, you can sort by category or payment method, and split a transaction into multiple categories. Overview of spending is easy to see, although the defaults are monthly, quarterly and annually, I would like to be able to see weekly or add custom dates.

So far, seems like a great app. Using it so I can both track my expenses and reduce amount of paper (receipts) floating around house. Would be nice if a) could turn off the business option as it defaults to this even though I only use for personal expenses and b) if I could pick a subcategory in addition to a main category. Also, does a great job picking up the date on the receipt, but the tax amount always needs to be adjusted, and the total amount occasionally needs to be adjusted.

Easy, prompts,. Clear presentations, totals everything out for you and much more. I've been searching for an app like this to help keep me organized. If only I could find an app that not only scans but then automatically places the scanned item into a pre set category, reads the amount due, payments made, how much you still owe . Do you think I'm asking too much? Sign, hate having to do double digit entry each month.

Just started using this app and seems to tick all the boxes for me. I wanted something that can capture a backup image of receipts, automatically read and record the amounts, and then populate a spreadsheet with all my expenses. This does it all! I've tried a few other apps that claim to provide these features yet fall short... Easy Expence actually delivers in all these aspects, and on a very user friendly platform!! 👍

So far So good... I love the convenience of the app. I scan all of my receipts at the end of the night and it helps me keep track of all of my expenses. My biggest challenge is keeping track of my mileage. That isn't an App issue, that's a me issue. Maybe the developers can add an option where we can choose to add certain daily, weekly, and monthly reminders. Customer service is also pretty helpful and responds in a timely manner.

Just starting out with a small business, I needed an affordable/free way to track expenses. This app was well reviewed so I gave it a try, and have enjoyed using it. Because many of my shop expenses are from azon, I've found that the receipt scanner does not work so well for the Amazon invoices but the amount can be easily entered manually, while still storing the photo of the invoice for reference. A good, easy to use all for first time small business owners!

Receipt Scanner is very useful but I wasn't thinking I was going to be asked for a fee to make me feel guilty for using it. Ask for a upfront fee. You're asking for $72 a year from each individual that uses the app. It's a bit steep even if it's voluntary. Then if by chance the individual stops using it and forgets, does the app continue to collect. The app needs to have a warning ⚠️ after an individual stops using it so the fee doesn't get extracted from the account.

I've finally found the perfect app for storing my receipts! I've tried out more than 6 paid apps in the past, but they all failed to meet my expectations. However, this app has been a total game-changer for me! Not only is it incredibly easy to use, but it also keeps all my receipts neat and organized. No more struggling to find missing or dealing with torn receipts. With this amazing app, all of my receipts are stored safely and securely. I'm so happy to have found this app. Thank you!!! 😊

My original rating was a one star. They advertised it as free and then popped up a price after about a week. However you could choose your own price so it was still free. I used the app for about a year with minimal issues. Now there was an update and it's not free at all anymore. I don't mind paying, but a company that advertises as a free app should stay free.

App worked very well before recent update. I lost about 7 months of information and this is the second time that has happened after an update. The newest version is extremely slow, I am finding myself pressing options 4-5 times before it will actually open. Also noticed that there is no "check" option anymore for payment info so I had to add it like a credit card. Overall, I liked the old version better.

Even with the receipt scanner still in beta, (just hit the shutter button and don't wait for the app to take the pic.) this app is amazing! Super simple to use and intuitive. Ands it's pretty damn accurate too, only had one or two receipts not read the amount properly. Love how it picks out taxes and the card that you use! Keep up the good work, will definitely getting a subscription

You bunch of slime ball scumbags! I haven't used this app in a couple of months, and when I do, you're now charging for it?! Fa-Q! Your app sucks because none of the information goes into the proper categories when you snap the receipt, and you waste a lot of time manually correcting it... everytime!! And now you want to charge a premium service charge for something that doesn't work?! Again... Fa-Q!! I actually purchased yearly subscription to SimplyWise because how much better it works. Fa-Q!

Wanted to like this one but apparently it doesn't do OCR so there's no way to search your receipts for specific transactions. As a basic receipt scanner/expense tracker, it seems to be fine. Doesn't allow you to tag expenses with descriptors, but you can assign a receipt to multiple "reports" and easily view those reports.

OMG! This had got to be the best scanner I have dealt with. Even had Expensive and that was lackluster as all get out because it forces you to sign up for their ice service. Pathetic at best. This one worked from the start. It didn't plague me to sign up for a subscription. And once it did (hey I know good apps aren't free!) it gave me, wait for it, OPTIONS! But at no time did performance drop Before asking for subscription. That alone sold it for me. I signed up for yearly subscription.

I was a little frustrated that I got about 6 items scanned or "processed" if you will, & it required a subscription on the buisness side of things to go any further. I contacted customer support, and had explained that I'm now homeless & jobless due to this covid BS & expecting less help than I've gotten from any government agency, was extremely surprised to see that the developer team or customer service actually helped! I don't want to say how much they helped, but you'd be surprised. TY team

So far, free version has everything I need. The receipt auto processing is 95% perfect, just takes about 15-20 seconds after a purchase, and I have everything I need. You can even do no picture and just keep the total, date, and where you purchased, keeping data usage extremely low. Auto crops the ones you do keep. Export directly to CSV via email, all backed up via cloud. Don't care too much about the data, as credit card companies see the exact same data. May end up paying, to support them:)

Saved me so much time having to itemize all my receipts. There were a few receipts that it would seem to randomly make up totals and dates for but customer support was amazing, very fast to respond to me and after sending a screenshot the problem stopped. If your like me and have a mass of receipts in a box that need to be itemized, this app is worth every penny.

I am a longtime user of this app, because it was the best of the bunch out there for years. This app used to garner 5 stars from me, but ever since their most recent update, things has gone downhill. Taking away the ability to crop receipts was a poor decision, and the app has gotten progressively slower in response time when editing data. Where it used to take me seconds to upload now takes at least a minute plus. If the app gets back to what it once was, then I'll add some stars back.

They actually care! The ai detention needs a little training but compared to my QuickBooks nightmare just doing a simple bill or receipt scan in is so much more simple. I don't have 800 things to fill out, of get sent to a separate page to add vendor contact details when all I wanted was to toss a piece of paper. Rock on guys! 🥰

It's a cool app with potential, but it misclassifies way too much. It pulls from my email and automatically logs receipts, which is convenient-but it constantly tags refunds, estimates, and even reimbursements as income. That's not just wrong, it could seriously mess up my taxes if I didn't double check everything. Also it desperately needs a way to scan long receipts like every other receipt app. Along with a camera widget option for multiple workspaces

Great App - needed a simply way to track and categorize household expenses. I have the ability to delete any and all transactions linked to my bank account that I don't care to track such as transfers between accounts. Only thing I would change is bulk editing. Some transactions from my bank account automatically defaulted to transfer or service it would be nice to be able to select multiple transactions from the same vendor and categorize once.

I use this app for monthly household budgeting and it works great. The UI is simple and tells me how much is spent at each store or in each category. The receipt detection for date, taxes, and total price doesn't work well, but I'm using it for receipts in Japan so it's fine. I won't let a little bit of manual input tarnish an otherwise great rating. The support team is constantly receiving feedback and implementing suggestions, so I am hopeful that the app's usefulness will keep growing.

It scans the receipts of the business expenses and automatically recognize the store name and total amount, it is really good tool, it is easy to use, never hangs or any issues, better the complex quicken books or other compititers. It is very useful when IRS asks for receipts of the business expenses. I love it, it's free and pay some minimum amount based your affordability. Jay

I am a newby, but so far so good! I reallllly like that it scans receipts because I dont want to manuallt do this using Excel. I like that is categorizes in deductible and non deductible. I like that there are reports and that it stores my receipts digitally. All these features are gonna make it easy for my tax guy and if I get audited. However, sometimes the date and amounts are wrong. Also, I am not sure how the report will look and if it'll be helpful and break expenses down.

I found this app useless and a waste of my time. The scanner camera is unable to read some receipt styles, when I try to scroll down the list of expenses, the slider bounces back not letting me see the last items. You cant delete an item but only archive it which means its never deleted. The report generator exports only as excel, not pdf and it comes with missing elements. Too many problems. Their response to reviews means they are willing to improve. I will look at it again in the future.

So far..great experience with this app. I think there should be more flexibility/options with the payment plans, at the same time, the OCR on this works really well; I use a combination of this and some clever Excel skills to quickly knock out my expense reports every week. I highly recommend this app as an alternative if you're not happy with some of the other ones on the store.

This is a great app to record expenses. I use the free version of Microsoft Lens to get a snapshot PDF of every receipt as it happens, then later use Easy Expense to import it from PDF into Easy Expense. It requires me to manually input the amounts, but I don't care, because using Easy Expense app to photo, results in a bad shot and way more memory storage, plus Easy Expense is not good at scanning its photo for tax & total. If I were using Easy Expense for business, which I am not, a 3.

I tried the app for the trial period. I'd keep it if it had a couple more professional touches: 1. Ability to optionally add a logo to the expense report header 2. Ability to customize the "From" address used when emailing the expense report (currently says it's from Easy Receipts) 3. Ability to optionally export the image(s) contained on the expense report. Thank you.

The date needs to be extracted from the receipt, rather tan using the current date. Out of 4 receipts I tried, it got the vendor right all 4 times, but that was the only success. Taxes were wrong every time, nit even close, with a value which didn't exist on the receipt. Only once did the total read correctly. One total said I spent $107 MILLION!!!! It's useless if I need to correct and key everything in. I'm also looking for each item to be extracted, not just the totals.

I have been looking for an app to track my expenses that stores the receipt as well so we can make budget this app is fantastic and it has helped a lot you are able to snap a quick picture of the receipt and finds the total, where you where shopping, and puts it in categories for you and it doesn't read it right you can manually change if needed.

I literally just started using the app and snapped about six receipts so far and it asked me for a review so this is a little bit premature but I definitely like it for sure! It seems really easy to use and it picks up the names of the receipts most of the time. Right now I'm in the very beginning stages of my new business so I'm totally bootstrapping this. Hopefully we'll start paying you guys soon!

Super easy to use almost always correct on dates and other info retrieved from scan. I'm just using to update files and make the conversion to digital so it's awesome to be free to scan the last 5 years receipts into and be done! In all honesty its working so great I may just keep and use as our go to app for current receipts I'm adding those as well to do a compare and contrast to what we are currently using. I love saving money and when something is fabulous and saves money its 👍👍 and ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐!

This is been a great app to keep my receipts and finances organized. There are no annoying ads and it works every time I go to use it. Every time I make a purchase a just snap a picture of the receipt and I file the picture under whichever category I choose. This way I can keep track of how much I'm spending each month. Great app, thanks.

App is NOT free despite dev's claims, it forces payment screen over & over & won't allow new entries without pay after a certain # of entries made. I'd happily pay if some things were fixed: mileage entries that allow for more than 1 stop per trip; save frequently visited locations so you don't have to enter them over & over; ability to enter income; creating your own category only worked once, it never saved any categories I created after that; autofill from camera only works 1/2 the time.

Where are the photos of the receipts stored on my phone? I would like to be able to quickly view them or share them outside of thr app. So far i am only seeing an export option for data to send to my email. If my photos are not stored locally for quick access then i might need to find another app. Edit: Thanks, but no pop up when i click advanced options images under excel. It only emails me a link to download the data.

App doesn't quite do what I needed it to do so I'm looking into alternatives, however, I was moved to make a review because of how simple, quick, and easy it was not only to create my account but to delete it as well. No ifs, ands, or buts, quick and easy. Good app design wanted to give them credit for it.

Decent app. Expect a pay wall after a few scans. I do have issues with it crashing while trying to take photos of my receipts. Also, the yellow box thing that pops up doesn't always show. I don't find it necessary majority of the time anyway. This app is quite slow and takes a while to load things.

I use this to track groceries and eating out each month. It works phenomenally! I also love the summery giving us a percentage of the budget we use to eat out. I would like to be able to manually put in how much I can pay for the app rather than the few choices it offers. It works so well I would pay but I am not able to afford the minimum it had a an option.

I'm adding to this review because this is a GREAT ap. I've been looking for exactly this type of solution for months. Other services offer so many duplicates to what I already have via Square, etc., and cost a ton to obtain the big piece for me - receipt scanning, and the option to create and download or share those expenses with my accountant. Super affordable, great interface, and the scanner is very accurate. Love it. Big fan!

the scans are 95% accurate, sometimes I have to manually correct some numbers if the receipts are blurry or smudged, or if the receipt itself has a weird format. otherwise this is still highly recommended. I am using this for my small corporations bookkeeping and this is saving me an insane amount of time. I used to manually input everything in a spreadsheet. I wish I had this app earlier. I needed some help and there is a message options for help and the customer server was on point!
Amazing app, so easy to upload and keep receipts organised by just taking a photo. It scans the photo and auto fills the details (vat etc). Makes doing quarterly VAT returns a breeze. Thanks

was great until it wasn't. Constant receipt not captured errors. App cannot read date on most receipts even when they are clear. I have scan every receipt multiple times to get it to save and triple check the date because it is typically wrong. That extra time is adding up. Very frustrating
Wonderful and useful with zero glitches. Additionally this is terrific to have without the paper trail come Tax Time.
Good app, it's just very laggy. When you go to save a transaction, it can take up to 20 seconds. Just way too long.They can fix that.That would be a great app

Doesn't detect the date properly at all times, way off by months on occasion. Doesn't detect HST line on the gas receipts, sometimes only. Receipts are all of the same quality, not blurry or anything. Receipts clearly shows Subtotal 15.23 in BOLD just skips over that. Then Tip 3.05 Then Total 18.28 so I have to calculate my own tax? Insists on calling shell hell lol
good app, many improvements and additions can be done, but generally works well
good app but sometimes I have plenty of room to scan more receipts free of charge and it tries to make me purchase before I can scan more.
Always improving and quick to answer. I wish the scanner was a bit better. People I refer keep using it.

This is my favorite expense tracking app. 👍 Addition: felt the need to add to my review. This app just keeps getting better and better. This app has made tracking my business expenses so much easier and the accuracy is getting better all the time. Again, thank you developer. (4-4-26)
This is actually pretty easy to use. It scans the receipt and it pulls the information out of the receipts for you. sometimes reads it incorrectly but easy to edit too.
Makes keeping track of your receipts easy and organized. Awesome app.

This app is perfect for keeping the receipts in order to be able to get all the receipts properly and updated, especially for budgeted monthly turnovers as well as balance sheet purposes. It is wonderful.

I had some issues - as below - and the company got right back to me. It wasn't in the software, it had to do with the scanning and handling it too quickly. Back to fantastic app now! 👌 ----‐ It was great until the update. Now it's telling me EVERY time I try to scan that "image not synced and local file not found." I will not renew my upgrade if this doesn't get fixed. It's already been a couple of months of annoyances.

Best app to file your bills and tickets. I am a freelancer in the UK and I was struggling to find a clear, quick (and appealing) app. I found this one and I couldn't be happier. In fact, I use it for my whole bookkeeping because I don't need one of those overcomplicated softwares that demand a lot of time to understand. A plus of this app is the receipt scan, never seen a faster one.

Most of the time doesn't get dollar value of the receipt correctly. Also, if you are Cad and need to enter in CAD dollars it is not free. You have to pay. Used for a month I have deleted. If it was working and truly was easy I would have used paid version but unfortunately not that easy. As you need to enter dollar value most of the time and sometime the name of the the store. I also like to say thank you for allowing me to try for free.

Used to be free but now they're imposing exaggerated fees for just scanning receipts! I agree with other users. The free version is useless. Limited to 10 receipts per month. We can accumulate that in one day on a trip. Paying the monthly fees they want, might as well hire someone to just take pictures of your receipts. I wish they can do better for their loyal customers. 😞

The app works really well. There was an issue at the start after I paid for it, and restrictions kicked in. After I left a review, the developer got back to me, and a cycling of the phone power corrected the issue. The app does a lot of sorting out of the receipt automatically most of the time, the reports then make it really easy to submit my expenses.

As other people mentioned in reviews, after a few scan of receipts, the ad asking to pay monthly fee comes up. In the app description, it says it is free of charge for personal use, however it is not true. Unless you pay fee, you cannot continue to use app or scan any more receipt. You cannot select $0 or opt out for payment either. I have contacted the seller via email a few weeks ago but no one has responded. How can I resolve this problem if no one in customer service replies !? Ridiculous.

This app is truly amazing in a very negative way never ever before have I had to do so much effort to find out what the price is... The only way is to to create a account. (It's more than 40 euros a year) the free version is absolutely useless. Perhaps the app is perfectly worth it. When a app tries to hide so much information.... I run and I run quickly

I highly recommend trying Slip-Scan instead. It is way more accurate, has more features, and can actually extract line-items with AI. It's also free and the premium plans are way cheaper. Easy expense has failed to extract my invoices correctly, it keeps getting dates, prices and vendor names wrong. Also, the categorization is not dynamic. I understand its purpose but I feel there far better apps that do more for way less...

So far, excellent! I only need fairly basic functions - receipt scanning, email in. but the extra options like auto tracking mileage, the UI, the categorisation have already made next year's taxes more streamlined. Customer service has been great so far, helping me have the features I need at a price I can afford (I'm now saving money from the previous app I was using that had fewer features). Would recommend!

Just started using this app and it's so user friendly. They don't demand payment but instead just ask if you can donate a small amount to keep the app going which is optional. I just found it so easy and simple to use especially with the scanning feature. It's spot on when your receipts are in good condition otherwise you might have to change a few numbers around. Highly recommend :)

I don't normally fill out these things. But this time I am because the team has been absolutely exceptional ! Very helpful in answering all my questions. I have used this App for years. When I got a new phone decided to update the App. Was a little lost for a while, but now REALLY loving it. I'm only using a small portion of what's available, so I know it has huge potential. You can edit the Vendor's and Categories easily and even the little pic ! Honestly it is the best ! Thx Easy Expense Team.

Been putting off this tax work for my new business and finally discovered this app. Easy to use and accurate. Moreover, really appreciate their support for accessibility to the paid version via pay-what-you-can. Most definitely recommend if tracking numbers is not your forte and could use a hand up without breaking the bank. This will get you on the right track.

Wow! Smashed out 3 years of old receipts within a few hours and exported it into a spreadsheet for my accountant within the one week free trial. The OCR is accurate most of the time so there's minimal data entry. Have organised for my whole family to use it. Would like a little more control over the export process but it's much better than similar apps at this price point.

Just What I needed ! I've been looking for a SIMPLE Receipt Scanner that helps track my Business Expenses. Most are too complicated, expensive, or unappealing. This is a great little app that scans my receipts and uploads it to their cloud service. The AI is a bit wonky, in that it sometimes tells me there are split bills, or it sometimes doesn't read it properly. But there is an Edit function that allows you to rescan the receipt, making the problem moot! Will donate soon! Bravo, Developers!

I initially downloaded this app to track paper receipts and now I can't live without it!!!! As someone who hates budgeting, the integration of a bank/credit card has made my spending tracking effortless and I was able to identify and cut back areas of spending. Not to mention that for a FREE app there are no nuisances, I have all the features I need, and the support team have done an awesome job when I was having issues syncing my credit card. Highly recommend!!

This is nearly what I am looking for. Implement the following and I will purchase: 1) Split transactions. (many big box stores allow you to shop for groceries, clothing, home imprivement, etc). 2). Customize categories. Currently no option in settings. 3). Method of payment, and allowing you to add cash, bank accounts, credit cards, gift cards, paypal, etc as method of payment on the receipt. 4). Save a copy of the scanned picture as a jpg or png and ability to export in easy named format.

Focused on core function and convenient. For improvement, it would be nice to add filters like able to search by item names or categories. For more advancement, it will be nice to capture text or email based receipt, to go paperless.

This does exactly what I need! Fast receipt analysis as well wth great easy to understand breakdown! Thank you! Please allow a section in the exported file to show memo or description? It only shows tags at the moment. Statistics also don't reflect multiple currencies recorded at the moment. Not sure what is the limit on the number of receipts right now, but given its functionality, I will happily pay for this and also get cloud backup! Please stay like this! 👍👍👍 Subscriptions suck!

When this came out I was reasonable impressed and defiences were quickly addressed. I enjoyed simplifying my life. The apps not perfect, it lack enhanced image features available in others. I previously used Ace Receipt which has now been re-release with new receipt imaging and Ai enhancements . you guys need to look at this product and do a bit of catch up.

Very happy with the app. I scan as soon as I have paid in the store, then check and correct the details. No more saving papier receipts. Now also backup to phone. Also, now before buying, I can easily check the old prices of the product.

App functionality is great, just what I need. However, lately this app insists that it be installed using Google Play Store. I prefer to use Aurora Store to install apps. Now I can't use the app. Really disappointing behavior from the developer. Updated to one star since I can't even get my data exported! Poorly done indeed!

I just download this and scanned a few receipts to see if it will work for me. Well, it scans and does a nice report. I don't really care about the report. What I care about is how it names the file, so I can file it in my computer the way I want to. I can't seem to change the file name unless I go in and manually change each one. Is there any way to change this?? I want it to name the file with the date, then the company name and then the amount. I don't want any other data in the file name.

I love this app! I wanted to capture information and export data. I'm extremely happy with what it does because the captures have been flawless and accurate. I export to do my own reporting so I don't need built in analytics or reporting. I'm sharing this with everyone that I know. I hope there's an apple version sometime soon for my apple friends (oxymoron)

great app. scanning could be a little faster but accuracy is high and unlike others you can delete items from the receipt and it automatically reflect in the expense total. updated my review to 5 star as the developer implemented my suggestions of date custom date filters for report generation. They also added a tick box for each individual item on the receipt so you can easily include/exclude. Reasonable one off price for a great suite of features. other competitors are charging 10x annually

Very useful app for scanning and organizing receipts. I started using it after a friend recommended it. Although I noticed a few bugs in the beginning, the developers are actively fixing them through updates. Overall, it’s a great tool to maintain a clear history of purchases.
A good app for tracking your expenses. Very easy to use.
Especially smooth, tidy and neat, receipts recognised soon and allow to edit. All receipts listed by time, and the statistics are beautiful.
Really Great App!! Help me alot and saves alot of time.
Amazing app! Super convenient and simple to use
Works great! One suggestion. Add an "about" section with a way to share the play store link, so I can easily share with friends and family.

Am not reviewing Apps honestly. But this App "Receipt Scanner" earns my time to post a feedback. Good scanning, records the important details (including receip line items) and even generate summary details via AI. And also it is one-time payment to back-up receipts in your google drive. Great Deals! It's just new but I dare to try because most of the existing Apps sucks!

I am happy with this app, I have been testing multiple apps of the same category. this is one that provides accurate scanning and its conversation into an excel sheet. before the latest update I was able to upload a long receipt in dividing them into multiple segments, separate photos in a single request. now in the latest update I am unable to do so. over I like this app. I have also sent detailed feedback on their email mentioned.
this has been a great app for me so far. I can generate a single PDF with all of my receipts and attach it for expense reports.

Five stars for free with no ads. Four for No backup just export to pdf/spreadsheet, can't delete line items, cant see full original image. Otherwise does an amazing job of quickly getting info from receipt and can add to catagories. I would pay (NOT SUBSCRIBE) if this had those features. (ADDITIONAL) Please allow images to be SHARED or OPENED with the app. But more importantly, itemized report not just receipt total.
easy and effective scanning
Easy to use, and help me assign the category, Good.
Amazing app. i wanted something basic that didn't require signing in and just did the job I wanted which was to scan my receipts. The report is very detailed Perfect.
exactly what I needed to keep track of receipts
really really just Good... it works!
This app scans receipts very well, also the receipts can be backed up to Google drive with a one time purchase. This app has greatly surpassed my expectations!
No data collected which is great. Didnt have a way to scan in bulk which would be nice.
This is good. Kindly add tags to group them by trip or job, and also filter by those tags/jobs and export by that as well.
AI is only about 70% reliable with no way to edit and correct. most common issues is the date in error. example 25/12/05 can be Dec 05, 2025 or Dec 25, 2005
great app I use it everyday
super easy to use
Just does what it does, simple, doesn't require registration like others
love it ! simple to use
maybe just maybe this could be it th81 I'm looking for...keep you posted...
excelente, escaneo facturas y puedo hacer reporte para saber gastos y pagos del Tax
Useful app.

User interface in this app is pretty slick. It's easy to use, it scans crumpled and mangled receipts well. It makes categorizing individual line items REALLY easy, which is what I needed. But, you can't even view a categorization report without paying the premium membership. You can only download the images of the scanned receipts on the free and mid-level memberships. The description of the membership level perks are misleading. 3 stars for a well assembled app. I will be uninstalling.

This app is good but it could be so much better with a little bit of work. If it automatically did the math when you took something off a receipt, calculated tax or had the ability to turn off certain "features" for example. It does catch duplicate receipts, that's handy. It doesn't always work when scanning multiples and it often comes up with weird names for stores that you have to fix manually.

Check to be sure you're signing up for the right subscription! Customer support has been GREAT! I love how easy it is to scan receipts and set up categories! Seeing all the details self-populate (date, vendor, line items, tax, total, and suggested categories) is actually FUN! As a landlord with multiple properties dealing with receipts has NEVER been fun before. I'm still learning about the reports but getting the receipts captured and having that record is worth it's weight in gold.

The app works well but it has some hangups. It doesn't do well scanning long receipts and will miss about half of the line items or mistake a coupon line as a purchased item, so I had to enter a lot of it by hand, which defeats the purpose of the scanner. It is not free and kind of expensive IMO. You get 250 saves, and then you have to subscribe to the personal plan for $29.99/yr or the business plan (which offers more features) for $89.99/yr. It's not bad but could be better for the price point

For the most part, it seems to work just fine. The biggest downside I've discovered is that the app will sometimes "forget" all the information that it just gathered from the picture of a receipt. This happened if I was trying to create or edit a folder while entering receipt information. It would forget the store name and dollar amounts that had been there just a moment ago. It's a bit too much work to be useful for my needs. I won't be keeping this app.

I have been using the free version for about 5 months now. I am a small business owner and have a very difficult time keeping up with my expnses. This is a digital filing cabinet and works great! I toss my receipts, bills, business cards, etc. After recording them in the app. You can export a folder through email but only share files through text.

Tried the app for a week. It wasn't able to read the receipts half of the time and I could not use email receipts at all since Yahoo is not supported. Amazon receipts worked better, although "deal" discounts were not linked to the item so it was difficult to properly track. All in all, more trouble than it helps. Definitely not worth the price.

Very good app for keeping up with paper and digital receipt, automatically scans your emails you choose to connect and tracks your mileage as well. As I said it's features are simple and easy to understand, only downside is you only get so many scans and saves and then you have to subscribe and pay monthly. In my opinion, this is one app that would be worth it, I just have to many subscriptions as is, lol.

unfortunately you can't tell because reports is part of the subscription 😕. it's sluggish, picks up email orders and confirmations, credit card bills for what's already entered. no pdf import/scan that I found. widget is just to take a picture of the receipt. I'd consider purchase at a one time for life if we could try the reports, but unfortunately, it looks like things need a bit more tweaking to get receipts to split and with no pdf to scan or import. it's not quite there.

I usually don't leave reviews for apps, but this one deserves it. It keeps surprising me with cool features. Like how I just walked out of Lowe's, and I received a notification asking if I'd like to import the receipt that was just sent to my email. It even added to my calendar the last day my items are returnable, 90 days from today. Rarely do I find an app like this that, not only makes my life easier, but does so autonomously.

I love this app!!! Super easy to use to save and file receipts. You can text pictures of your receipts, email in receipts, and set up your email to auto feed them into the system. Super easy to pull reports from. You can even set up auto reports to be pulled and sent to you. Reports can be pulled from any individual category or some or all and can include actual pictures of the receipts. This app has made saving and filing receipts for taxes soooo easy!!!!

Buggy (receipts often don't save properly). Also this will only categorize your receipts, whether email or paper; you can reconcile with bank transactions (when that works) although I'm not sure what use that would be, but you can't categorize bank transactions that you don't have a receipt for without manually creating a blank receipt and typing all the transaction info in. And to top it off, you can't export to a spreadsheet without a $90 yearly subscription on TOP of the $30 for basic use!

I'm pretty disappointed. I wanted to try out the free version of the app and determine whether it's worth paying for the premium options. The free version was incredibly glitchy on my Samsung device. I was unable to move past this. The only way I was able to continue setup was if I selected at least 3 default options

I scanned 33 CVS receipts to test. The app only picked up the right date and total on 2 of them. Receipts were crisp and clear. I noticed that if the month and day were before today's month and day, it would automatically make the date 2024 (even tho the date was in 2023). This is a logic error as it was reading the month and day fine. I had to keep manually updating the year. The total was more successful, but it was only about 70/30.

Now, a REAL review: WARNING!! Avoid! The app tricks you to give them your phone number before you find out how expensive it is. Also they are spamming my email address even though I opted out durring setup. Now I regret giving my phone#. The price is not an option. In the free version, you can't do anything worthwhile. Sometimes you have to re-scan receipts to get accurate readings. For the price, it needs to be flawless. UPDATE: The business version option is a must but its almost $100/yr.

Skip. The so called free version only allows 50 saves and then you have to pay $30 annually to use it. Its reciepts, its not worth it. There are free apps for that. Personally, I'm not interested in another yet subscription. And the whole "free" version is bait and switch. Uninstalling the app and highly recommending looking elsewhere.

I'm trying out budget aps. This one tracks through email receipts and receipts you enter by taking a picture. I don't see a way to just track starting with 1-1-24. 👌 Perfect! Exactly what I was looking for. Can keep my recipes organized in categories. Can add categories that use image icons. Works with camera or files. The scan can automatically fill out the information in which to file. I can add note. Plus it even offers a remind for a return limit date. Already knowing when that date would by after scanning it came from walmart! I look forward to using this app this year and not care to keep paper recipes around. 😁👍

I purchased the PRO version of this app for personal and business use. I am very disappointed. I wasted a few hours of my valuable time. The app will not let me create rules (saves hrs). This app does not work well with any Android phone, it sometimes crashes when trying to open, and takes a long time to load when it does open.
